info.title: Scholiq Register
info.description: Register containing all schemas for the Scholiq application. v0.2.0 declares Scholiq's AVG Art. 30 processing activities (learner administration, attendance & leerplicht reporting, grading & assessment, signed attestations, credentialing, data exchange to DUO/OSO/municipality/HR, and AI features) as x-openregister-processing catalogue annotations on LearnerProfile, AttendanceRecord, Assessment, Attestation, Credential, DataExchangeJob, and AiFeature. Each carries purpose (doelbinding), legal basis (rechtsgrond), data categories, backend identifier, retention reference, owner/review fields, and opts the schema into OpenRegister's per-access read-logging (logReads:true, attribution.default referencing the activity code). Seeds arrive as drafts; the school's privacy officer activates them in the OpenRegister lifecycle. v0.3.0 adds ADR-046 portal-identity scoping refs (learnerRef / learnerRefs / submittedByRef / guardianRefs) alongside the existing Nextcloud-user-id fields on GradeEntry, FinalGrade, AttendanceRecord, Enrolment, Submission, ExcuseRequest, LearnerProfile, and GradeNotification — additive, optional, fail-closed; see openspec/changes/portal-identity/. v0.3.1 strips the AiFeature schema to its AVG Art. 30 processing carrier only — EU AI Act high-risk feature governance (lifecycle, DPO acknowledgement, register pages) is delegated to the Hermiq app (ADR-005 amendment). Requires OpenRegister >= 0.2.14. See openspec/specs/avg-verwerkingsregister/spec.md. v0.4.0 adds beroepspraktijkvorming (BPV) — six new schemas (Praktijkopleider, BpvPlacement, Praktijkovereenkomst, PokSignature, WerkprocesAssessment, BpvVisitReport) implementing the MBO work-placement/POK/leerbedrijf-verification/werkproces-assessment domain (WEB art. 7.2.8/7.2.9). No existing schema is modified. See openspec/changes/bpv-praktijkovereenkomst/. v0.5.0 adds parent-conferences (oudergesprekken-cyclus) — five new schemas (ConferenceRound, TeacherAvailability, ConferenceSignup, ConferenceSlot, ConferenceReport) implementing conference-round invitations, guardian/self signup, ConferenceScheduleGenerator's greedy conflict-free slot generation, and an append-only gespreksverslag (ConferenceReport). No existing schema is modified. See openspec/changes/parent-evening-planner/. v0.6.0 adds exam-board (examencommissie) case handling — two new schemas (ExemptionCase, FraudCase) implementing the WHW art. 7.13 exemption (vrijstelling) and fraud/plagiarism dossier flows: ExemptionCase submitted→in-assessment→granted|rejected|withdrawn with ExemptionGrantHandler bridging a grant into a published GradeEntry (sourceKind=exemption); FraudCase reported→hearing-scheduled→heard→decided(+dismissed) with FraudCaseDecisionGuard stamping a 42-day appealDeadline and FraudCaseDecisionHandler invalidating a contested concept GradeEntry on a fraud-proven verdict. GradeEntry gains sourceKind=exemption, exemptionCaseId/fraudCaseId refs, conditional value requiredness, FraudCaseBlockGuard on publish/republish, and a new invalidated terminal state; GradeEntry/FinalGrade gain an examboard RBAC read role. See openspec/changes/exam-board-case-handling/. v0.6.1 is doc-only: DataExchangeJob.target's description gains the 'ooapi-catalog' example, naming the OpenConnector target that syncs published/archived Course, Programme, and Cohort objects to the OOAPI 5.0 catalog hosted by opencatalogi, per the course-management publication contract resolving the course-management/data-exchange OOAPI self-contradiction. No schema/type change — target was already a free-text string. See openspec/changes/delegate-ooapi-to-opencatalogi/. v0.7.0 adds LtiToolPlacement — places an external LTI 1.3 tool inside a Course/Lesson, naming the corresponding lti_deployment UUID in OpenConnector's own register plus an optional CurriculumPlan/component/GradeScale mapping for AGS grade passback; brings the previously-dead Lesson.contentType='lti' enum value to life (contentRef now names an LtiToolPlacement, doc-only correction). GradeEntry.sourceKind gains lti-ags, plus ltiToolPlacementId/ltiAgsResultId fields (same per-sourceKind-id-field shape as submissionId/assessmentResultId/sessionId), so an LTI Assignment & Grade Services score carries an honest, traceable, idempotent origin. See openspec/changes/lti-tool-placement/. v0.8.0 adds the competency capability — CompetencyFramework (a named taxonomy with its own proficiencyLevels scale), Competency (recursive via parentId, mirroring Course.parentCourseId — a leaf Competency IS the learning outcome, no separate LearningOutcome schema), and CompetencyAttainment (a FinalGrade-shaped, read-only, per-(learnerId, competencyId) roll-up recomputed by the new CompetencyAttainmentRollupHandler listener). Course, Lesson, Assignment, Assessment, Item, Credential, and Programme each gain an additive competencyIds/requiredCompetencyIds array. WerkprocesAssessment gains a nullable, server-resolved competencyId generalizing its existing kwalificatiedossierCode/kerntaakCode/werkprocesCode strings (unchanged in shape) into the shared taxonomy, and its confirm transition additionally fires CompetencyAttainmentRollupHandler alongside the existing WerkprocesGradeEmitHandler. See openspec/changes/competency-framework/. v0.9.0 adds learning-progress-and-analytics — LessonCompletion (one row per (learnerId, lessonId), source: xapi | manual, written by the new LessonProgressHandler sibling listener on the same XapiStatement ObjectCreatedEvent XapiCompletionHandler already consumes — no mandatoryTraining/last-lesson gate — plus a learner self-serve manual path); Enrolment gains completedLessonCount/totalPublishedLessonCount aggregate-refs and a progressPercent field (EnrolmentProgressEvaluator/EnrolmentProgressRollupHandler, mirroring FinalGrade.value/GradeFormulaEvaluator — no division operator exists in the calculation DSL); EngagementScore (per learnerId+courseId time-on-task/recency/score, EngagementScoreEvaluator), EngagementRiskThreshold + EngagementRiskFlag (deterministic rule-based at-risk detection generalised beyond the HE/MBO-only BsaTrajectory, mirroring AttendanceThreshold/AttendanceFlag and BsaTrajectory/BsaProgressFlag, via the new EngagementSignalHandler). GroupTrendHeatmap.vue renders a cohort x period grade-trend heat map over existing GradeEntry data — no new schema. See openspec/changes/learning-progress-and-analytics/. v0.10.0 adds adaptive-release-and-prerequisites — closes the prerequisite hole: Course gains prerequisiteCourseIds (array of $ref Course), enforced by the new EnrolmentPrerequisiteListener on OpenRegister's ObjectCreatingEvent for the enrolment schema (NOT a lifecycle `requires` guard — Enrolment has no transition into its initial pending state for one to attach to; mirrors decidesk's SubmissionDeadlineListener/larpingapp's CharacterRequirementListener creation-time-veto shape). Lesson and Assessment each gain releaseConditions (array of {kind: lesson-completed|assessment-min-score, lessonId?, assessmentId?, minScore?}, AND-combined) and availableAfterDays (nullable integer — drip release relative to each learner's OWN Enrolment.created), evaluated per-learner at request time by the new stateless LessonReleaseEvaluator/LessonReleaseController (no @self/@aggregate/@ref calc-DSL token carries a per-viewer identity, so this cannot be materialised). Assessment's existing availableFrom/availableUntil/isAvailable absolute window is unchanged; the new gates layer on top. See openspec/changes/adaptive-release-and-prerequisites/. v0.11.0 adds report-card (periodic rapport composition & rapportvergadering review) — three new schemas: ReportPeriod (the school-wide term a report is composed for: periodCode matching GradeEntry.period/CurriculumPlan.components[].period/FinalGrade.breakdown.periods keys, curriculumPlanIds[]/cohortIds[] scope, a nullable lockDate backing a materialised isLocked calculation — NOT an automatic lifecycle transition, mirroring ConferenceRound.isBookingClosed's documented 'scheduled triggers cannot drive a transition' precedent); ReportCard (one composed document per learner per ReportPeriod: subjectGrades[] snapshotting FinalGrade.breakdown.periods[periodCode] plus sourceGradeEntryIds[], an attendanceSummary, mentor/teacher comments, a forward-compatible nullable competencyAttainment field, and fail-soft docudesk PDF-render state fields; lifecycle draft → rapportvergadering-review → finalised → published-to-parents, with reopen back to review); ReportCardParentNotification (append-only fan-out record mirroring GradeNotification's shape). ReportCardComposer (Listener, ADR-031 cross-object write bridge mirroring DataExchangeRunHandler's composeLeerplichtDossier/composeSwvDossier assembly shape, NOT the DataExchangeJob queue) composes ReportCards on ReportPeriod's compose transition and on ReportCard's recompose self-loop. GradeEntry.publish/republish's requires guard is swapped from FraudCaseBlockGuard to ReportPeriodLockGuard, which composes FraudCaseBlockGuard's existing check internally then additionally blocks publishing into a locked ReportPeriod's scope unless the actor holds admin/mentor/principal — a single-guard composition, not a second `requires` array entry: verified at HEAD (LifecycleAnnotationValidator::validate + LifecycleGuardRegistry::resolve) that `requires` is strictly a single DI-tag string, never an array, so 'second requires entry' precedents named in this change's own design.md (Credential.revoke) do not actually exist as an array in this register — Credential.revoke has exactly one requires guard. ReportCard.publishToParents requires ReportCardVisibilityGuard, which re-resolves every contributing GradeEntry.visibleFrom at the moment of publication (not trusted from compose time) so grade-visibility-scheduling's promise holds end-to-end. PortalContributionProvider::parentContribution() gains a fourth parentReportCards collection, identical childJoin reverse-scope pattern to parentGrades/parentAttendance/parentExcuseRequests, filtered to lifecycle published-to-parents only. See openspec/changes/report-card-composer/. v0.12.0 adds pupil-dossier — the everyday pupil dossier layer underneath the formal LearningPlan/SupportRequest/DeliberationRecord care chain: three new schemas, DossierNote (appendOnly observation/conversation/phone-call-home/concern/positive note, x-property-rbac restricting every row to admin/mentor/coordinator/the note's own authorId — the tightest floor the dialect can express; the finer team-visible/care-team-only/private-to-author tiering beyond that floor is a named, unimplemented OpenRegister platform-capability gap, not a fabricated guarantee), BehaviourIncident (appendOnly what/severity/append-only followUpActions log/resolution, own lifecycle open → in-handling → resolved, escalatedSupportRequestId referencing — never duplicating — a SupportRequest), and WellbeingCheckIn (appendOnly learner-authored moodScale 1-5 + optional comment, no x-openregister-authorization restriction — any authenticated user may submit their own, a documented platform gap same as SupportRequest.raisedBy). All three carry x-openregister-processing catalogue entries (scholiq-pupil-dossier-notes / scholiq-behaviour-incidents / scholiq-wellbeing-checkins). No existing schema is modified. See openspec/changes/pupil-dossier-notes/. v0.13.0 adds course-evaluation (vakevaluatie) — five new schemas closing the gap between Nextcloud Forms (a real survey instrument this change deliberately does not rebuild) and course-quality reporting: EvaluationCampaign (which Course(s)/Cohort(s), academicYear/period, a minimal built-in Likert+free-text questions[] instrument or an external-form convenience link Scholiq never ingests, a fixed anonymityPolicy, draft → open → closed → archived); EvaluationInvitation (system-provisioned per learner when a campaign opens, via EvaluationInvitationProvisioningHandler — the ONLY place a learner's identity and response status co-exist, reusing Enrolment.dueReminder's scheduled+filter reminder shape); CourseEvaluationResponse (appendOnly, anonymous BY SCHEMA SHAPE — no learnerId/submittedBy property exists at all, not RBAC-hidden — gated by CourseEvaluationEligibilityGuard, which mirrors ConferenceSignupGuardianGuard's session-resolved-caller-looked-up-against-a-different-schema shape and structurally prevents both uninvited and duplicate submission); CourseQualityScore (materialised per courseId/teacherId/academicYear/period roll-up, recomputed by CourseQualityScoreRollupHandler via CourseQualityScoreEvaluator — averaging exceeds this register's proven declarative count/count_distinct aggregation metrics, mirroring FinalGrade/GradeFormulaEvaluator's x-openregister-triggers.calculatedChange shape exactly, not an `engine`-keyed x-openregister-calculations entry, which is not a dialect key used anywhere in this register); ImprovementAction (declarative opleidingscommissie review/action tracker, no PHP guard). CourseEvaluationResponseSubmittedHandler re-resolves the same session identity after a successful submit and flips the caller's own EvaluationInvitation.hasResponded — a write to a different, unlinked object; the invitation never gains a field referencing which response satisfied it. No course-management schema is modified — Course/Cohort are referenced by $ref only. See openspec/changes/course-evaluation/. v0.14.0 adds payments — the `enrolment`/`course-management` specs both punted payment to 'a separate spec' that was never written; this closes the gap with five new schemas: FeeItem (the chargeable definition — kind, amount/currency/taxPosture, and a required voluntary flag: true is the Wet vrijwillige ouderbijdrage schoolkassa/trip/materials case, false is a genuine paid product like MBO contractonderwijs); Order/OrderLine (payer-facing request draft -> open -> partially-paid | paid -> refunded, with a materialised isOverdue calculation and dueSoon/overdue notifications mirroring Enrolment's exact idiom, and OrderTotalValidationGuard validating OrderLine.lineTotal sums against Order.totalAmount at finalize since no sum aggregation metric is precedented in this register); PaymentTransaction (appendOnly PSP round-trip per ADR-008, mirroring Attestation's evidentiary shape — scholiq forwards OpenConnector's opaque status only, parsing nothing PSP-specific); Entitlement (what a paid Order grants — structurally cannot gate a voluntary fee: FeeItemVoluntaryEntitlementGuard blocks the pending -> active grant transition whenever the linked FeeItem.voluntary is true, composing EntitlementOrderPaidGuard which additionally requires the linked Order to have reached paid). PaymentTransactionController delegates payment initiation/callback to OpenConnector's (not-yet-built) mollie-stripe-payment-adapter, reusing the established IClientService/IURLGenerator/IAppConfig bearer-token shape LtiToolPlacementController/DataExchangeRunHandler already use. No invoicing/dunning/ERP — that territory belongs to pipelinq/financeq. See openspec/changes/school-payments/. v0.15.0 adds accessibility-conformance — the toegankelijkheidsverklaring (accessibility statement) obligation under the Tijdelijk besluit digitale toegankelijkheid overheid (BDTO, BWBR0040936): three new schemas, AccessibilityStatement (channel identity, a 3-value status collapsed from the government's five-level A–E scale with the mapping documented in the schema description, evaluation method/date, standard applied, feedback contact, escalation route, a materialised reviewOverdue calculation mirroring Enrolment.isOverdue's @now/dateDiff idiom plus a calculatedChange notification mirroring TlvApplication.tlvExpiringSoon; lifecycle draft → published → archived, with AccessibilityStatementPublishGuard refusing to publish without evaluation evidence or a fully-compliant status while an open/mitigated limitation exists); AccessibilityLimitation (the known-limitations register — WCAG criterion, severity, affected surface, justification, disproportionate-burden flag, workaround, planned-fix date; open → mitigated → fixed; create/update restricted to admin/compliance-officer, mirroring xapi-statement/BsaWarning); AccessibilityFeedback (a user-reported barrier, create open to any authenticated user — the opposite RBAC posture, deliberately — with an onSubmitted notification to compliance-officer/admin mirroring ItemRevisionFlag's created-trigger shape; submitted → acknowledged → resolved). No new PHP controller or route — only the one lifecycle guard, per ADR-022/ADR-031. See openspec/changes/accessibility-conformance-statement/.

x-openregister.description: Scholiq — open-source LVS + LMS for Nextcloud compliance training, certification, and learning management.

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Issue, verify, and revoke verifiable credentials (EDCI / Open Badges 3.0) attesting completed courses and certifications for learners.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (Credential carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; align with the school's selectielijst)

Credential.title: Credential
Credential.description: Verifiable Credential (W3C VC + Open Badges 3.0). Append-only compliance evidence; issued on enrolment completion; supports expiry detection with tiered reminders.

learnerId.description: Opaque learner UUID. Never BSN.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

courseId.description: UUID of the associated Course. Null for manually issued credentials.
courseId.title: Course ID

kind.description: Credential type.
kind.title: Credential Type

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp. Null = does not expire.
expiresAt.title: Expires At

issuerDid.description: Decentralised Identifier of the issuing organisation.
issuerDid.title: Issuer DID

signature.description: RS256 compact JWS produced by CredentialSigningService.
signature.title: Signature

revocationReason.description: Human-readable revocation reason. Set on revoke transition.
revocationReason.title: Revocation Reason

issuedBy.description: Display name of the issuing organisation.
issuedBy.title: Issued By

regulationSlug.description: Regulation identifier (e.g. NIS2) inherited from the Course.
regulationSlug.title: Regulation Slug

enrolmentId.description: UUID of the originating Enrolment that triggered issuance. Used for idempotency (one credential per enrolment). Distinct from renewalEnrolmentId which records the renewal enrolment created on expiry.
enrolmentId.title: Enrolment ID

renewalEnrolmentId.description: UUID of the renewal Enrolment created on expiry. Written back by OR batch.
renewalEnrolmentId.title: Renewal Enrolment ID

verificationUrl.description: Public URL for unauthenticated credential verification.
verificationUrl.title: Verification URL

walletOfferStatus.description: EUDI-wallet offer delivery state. Orthogonal to `lifecycle` (which describes the credential's own validity, not wallet delivery). Null until the credential has first been pushed to a wallet.
walletOfferStatus.title: Wallet Offer Status

walletOfferedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the credential was pushed to the EUDI wallet via the `offerToWallet` transition. Null until first pushed.
walletOfferedAt.title: Wallet Offered At

walletClaimedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when openconnector reported the wallet holder claimed the offer. Null until claimed.
walletClaimedAt.title: Wallet Claimed At

walletAttestationRef.description: Opaque reference to the openconnector OpenID4VCI credential-offer/issuance session (the offer's UUID on openconnector's `eudi_credential_offer` object). Correlation key for claim sync-back and revocation propagation.
walletAttestationRef.title: Wallet Attestation Reference

walletOfferError.description: Last wallet-offer push or revocation-propagation failure message. Cleared on the next successful `offerToWallet`.
walletOfferError.title: Wallet Offer Error

competencyIds.description: UUIDs of Competency taxonomy nodes (competency capability) this issued credential attests the learner has attained — e.g. a diploma attesting every competency in its Programme's requiredCompetencyIds, or a microcredential attesting one leaf competency. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty; issuance logic is unchanged.
competencyIds.title: Competency IDs

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OpenRegister; do not set directly.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): credentials contain signed PII. Learner sees own record; admins see all. Teachers have no read access — only the credential-holder and admins. Write stays lifecycle-controlled.

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Operate adaptive learning paths and AI-assisted item generation for learners and record decision traces for transparency and accountability. EU AI Act high-risk classification, DPO acknowledgement, and enablement of these features are governed centrally in the Hermiq app (ADR-005).
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (AiFeature carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; align with the school's selectielijst)

AiFeature.title: AI Feature
AiFeature.description: AVG Art. 30 processing-activity declaration for Scholiq's AI-assisted learning. The EU AI Act high-risk feature register, DPO-acknowledgement gate, and lifecycle governance are delegated to the Hermiq app (ADR-005); this schema now only carries the processing-activity catalogue annotation.

slug.description: Machine-readable identifier for the processing-activity declaration.
slug.title: Feature Slug

description.description: Plain-language description of the AI-assisted learning processing.
description.example: Personalised course sequencing based on learner performance data.
description.title: Feature Description

Course.title: Course
Course.description: A course or training program (Schema.org Course). Lifecycle: draft → published → archived.

description.description: Course description
description.title: Course Description

mandatoryTraining.description: Whether this course is mandatory training
mandatoryTraining.title: Mandatory Training

renewalCourseSlug.description: Slug of the renewal/refresher course for this training
renewalCourseSlug.title: Renewal Course Slug

certificateTemplate.description: nc:files path to PDF certificate template
certificateTemplate.title: Certificate Template

lifecycle.description: Course lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine; do not set directly.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

parentCourseId.description: UUID of the parent Course. Makes Course recursive — a 'module' is a Course used as a container. Null for top-level courses.
parentCourseId.title: Parent Course ID

curriculumPlanId.description: UUID of the CurriculumPlan governing this course. Consumed by the grading spec.
curriculumPlanId.title: Curriculum Plan ID

programmeIds.description: UUIDs of Programmes that include this Course.
programmeIds.title: Programme IDs

ectsCredits.description: Bologna-style ECTS credit value this course/module contributes toward a learner's cumulative EC total. Additive field — existing rows leave it null. Only meaningful for level hbo|wo|mbo; po/vo/corporate courses never set it. A downstream credit-summing calculation (e.g. study-progress's BsaProgressEvaluator) MUST treat null as 0, not as an error.
ectsCredits.title: ECTS Credits

competencyIds.description: UUIDs of Competency taxonomy nodes (competency capability) this course teaches. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty.
competencyIds.title: Competency IDs

prerequisiteCourseIds.description: UUIDs of Course objects a learner MUST hold a completed Enrolment for before they may enrol in this Course. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty/absent and are unaffected. Structurally identical to CurriculumPlan.requiredCourseIds/Course.programmeIds (array-of-$ref idiom). Enforced by the enrolment capability's EnrolmentPrerequisiteListener (ObjectCreatingEvent on enrolment) — not a lifecycle guard, since Enrolment has no transition into its initial pending state for a `requires` guard to attach to.
prerequisiteCourseIds.title: Prerequisite Course IDs

Lesson.title: Lesson
Lesson.description: A lesson / learning module within a Course (Schema.org LearningResource). Lifecycle: draft → published → retired.

courseId.description: UUID of the parent Course
courseId.title: Course ID

contentRef.description: nc:files path or cmi5 launch URL for those content types. For contentType='lti', this MUST be the UUID of an LtiToolPlacement object, not a raw link — a static URL cannot carry a signed OIDC launch; the placement is resolved server-side and the actual launch is delegated to OpenConnector's lti-13-platform adapter.
contentRef.title: Content Reference

learningObjectives.description: Learning objectives for this lesson, as free text. Superseded (not replaced) by competencyIds for anything that needs to roll up into a learner's CompetencyAttainment or be queried structurally — learningObjectives itself is not linked to the competency taxonomy and never rolls up; free text remains for anything competencyIds can't yet express.
learningObjectives.title: Learning Objectives

competencyIds.description: UUIDs of Competency taxonomy nodes (competency capability) this lesson teaches. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty.
competencyIds.title: Competency IDs

releaseConditions.description: Per-learner adaptive-release conditions, AND-combined: this Lesson is available to a learner only once every listed condition is satisfied for THAT learner. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty/absent, matching today's unconditional-on-publish behaviour. Evaluated per-learner at request time by LessonReleaseEvaluator — deliberately NOT materialised as a schema-level calculation, because availability differs per learner while this Lesson row is shared across every learner enrolled in the course (no @self/@aggregate/@ref calc-DSL token carries 'who is asking').

kind.description: Condition kind. lesson-completed requires an XapiStatement completion/passed verb for lessonId; assessment-min-score requires a graded AssessmentResult for assessmentId summing to at least minScore.
kind.title: Condition Kind

lessonId.description: UUID of the prerequisite Lesson. Required when kind is lesson-completed.
lessonId.title: Prerequisite Lesson ID

assessmentId.description: UUID of the prerequisite Assessment. Required when kind is assessment-min-score.
assessmentId.title: Prerequisite Assessment ID

minScore.description: Minimum summed score required on the referenced Assessment. Required when kind is assessment-min-score.
minScore.title: Minimum Score

releaseConditions.title: Release Conditions

availableAfterDays.description: Drip-release delay: number of days after the learner's OWN Enrolment.created timestamp (for this Lesson's Course) before the lesson becomes available to that learner. Null = no drip delay (today's behaviour). This is the same static duration for every learner (safely declarative); the per-learner RESOLVED instant (enrolment.created + N days) differs per learner sharing this Lesson row, so it is resolved by LessonReleaseEvaluator at request time, never materialised. Applies in addition to any releaseConditions.
availableAfterDays.title: Available After Days (Drip)

mandatoryTraining.description: Whether this lesson is tagged as mandatory training
mandatoryTraining.title: Mandatory Training

regulationSlug.description: Regulation identifier for mandatory-training compliance tracking (e.g. NIS2, AVG, BIO)
regulationSlug.title: Regulation Slug

lifecycle.description: Lesson lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine; do not set directly.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

LtiToolPlacement.title: LtiToolPlacement
LtiToolPlacement.description: Places an external LTI 1.3 tool inside a Course or Lesson. Stores only the reference to the corresponding lti_deployment registration living in OpenConnector's own register (cross-app, bare UUID — OR relations do not span registers/apps) plus the optional grading-component mapping an AGS score for this placement feeds. Scholiq never stores or handles the OIDC/JWT material itself — that lives entirely in OpenConnector's lti-13-platform adapter. Lifecycle: draft → active → retired.

lessonId.description: UUID of the Lesson this tool is placed in. Null for a course-level placement not tied to one lesson.
lessonId.title: Lesson ID

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this tool is placed in. Null for a lesson-level placement.
courseId.title: Course ID

openconnectorDeploymentId.description: The lti_deployment object identifier living in OpenConnector's own register (a separate app/register set). Deliberately a plain string, not a canonical $ref (ADR-062 rule 7 scopes $ref to relations within the same register set) — mirrors DataExchangeJob.connectorRunId's bare-string cross-app pattern.
openconnectorDeploymentId.title: OpenConnector Deployment ID

launchMode.description: LTI launch message type for this placement.
launchMode.title: Launch Mode

curriculumPlanId.description: UUID of the CurriculumPlan an AGS score for this placement feeds. Null when this placement does not feed grade passback.
curriculumPlanId.title: Curriculum Plan ID

gradeEntryComponentId.description: The CurriculumPlan.components[].componentId an AGS score for this placement feeds. Mirrors Assessment.gradeEntryComponentId's exact naming. Null when this placement does not feed grade passback.
gradeEntryComponentId.title: Grade Entry Component ID

gradeScaleId.description: UUID of the GradeScale used to normalise an incoming AGS score for this placement. Null when this placement does not feed grade passback.
gradeScaleId.title: Grade Scale ID

lifecycle.description: Placement lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine; do not set directly.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

XapiStatement.title: XapiStatement
XapiStatement.description: xAPI 1.0.3 statement stored in the LRS substrate (append-only per ADR-002). Every save emits xapi.statement.received audit entry.

verb.description: xAPI Verb with id IRI and display map
verb.title: xAPI Verb

object.description: xAPI Activity, Agent, SubStatement, or StatementRef
object.title: xAPI Object

result.description: xAPI Result (score, success, completion, duration, extensions)
result.title: xAPI Result

context.description: xAPI Context (registration, instructor, team, contextActivities, extensions)
context.title: xAPI Context

timestamp.description: When the event described by the statement occurred
timestamp.title: Event Timestamp

stored.description: When the statement was received and stored by the LRS
stored.title: Stored Timestamp

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this statement relates to (Scholiq denormalisation)
courseId.title: Course ID

lessonId.description: UUID of the Lesson this statement relates to (Scholiq denormalisation)
lessonId.title: Lesson ID

verified_actor_id.description: Server-trusted learner identifier stamped by the xAPI ingest controller after authenticating the sender. NEVER derived from payload.actor.*. XapiCompletionHandler reads ONLY this field to prevent credential forgery (C6).
verified_actor_id.title: Verified Actor ID

x-openregister-authorization._comment: SB1 (wave-12): xapi-statement creation is admin-only as a stopgap until a dedicated xAPI ingest controller stamps verified_actor_id server-side. Prevents any authenticated user from forging xAPI statements with attacker-controlled verified_actor_id values. Track: issue #TBD.

LessonCompletion.title: LessonCompletion
LessonCompletion.description: Per-learner, per-Lesson completion state — one row per (learnerId, lessonId), an upsert target (not an append-only log; XapiStatement itself is already the append-only source of truth for the xAPI half — mirrors the relationship FinalGrade has to GradeEntry). Written by the new LessonProgressHandler for every resolvable completed/passed xAPI statement (no mandatoryTraining or last-lesson gate, unlike XapiCompletionHandler's Enrolment-completion path — a sibling listener on the same ObjectCreatedEvent<XapiStatement>, not an edit to that handler), or self-reported (source: manual) by the learner for content types that do not emit xAPI statements, mirroring AssessmentResult's unrestricted self-serve create posture. No x-openregister-lifecycle — a completion fact has no workflow states to move through. See openspec/changes/learning-progress-and-analytics/.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner who completed the lesson. xAPI-sourced rows are written from XapiStatement.verified_actor_id only — NEVER from user-controlled payload.actor.* (the same C6 trust boundary XapiCompletionHandler already enforces).
learnerId.title: Learner ID

learnerRef.description: UUID reference to the LearnerProfile object — the portal-subject scoping key (ADR-046 A4). Distinct from learnerId, which is the Nextcloud user id. Additive and optional; existing rows leave it unset and stay invisible to the portal (fail-closed) until backfilled.
learnerRef.title: Learner Ref

courseId.description: UUID of the Lesson's parent Course (denormalized — mirrors XapiStatement.courseId/.lessonId).
courseId.title: Course ID

enrolmentId.description: UUID of the learner's active Enrolment in this Course. Resolved at write time by LessonProgressHandler the same way XapiCompletionHandler resolves the active enrolment today. Null when no active Enrolment is found, or for a manual completion (the frontend does not resolve it).
enrolmentId.title: Enrolment ID

source.description: Origin of the completion fact. xapi rows are written by LessonProgressHandler off a real XapiStatement; manual rows are learner self-reported for content types that do not emit xAPI statements.
source.title: Completion Source

verb.description: The xAPI verb IRI (completed or passed) when source is xapi. Null for manual completions.
verb.title: xAPI Verb

score.description: Result score (from XapiStatement.result.score.scaled) when present on the source statement. Null when the statement carried no score, or for manual completions.
score.title: Score

completedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the lesson was completed. Refreshed (not duplicated) when a second completion statement/report arrives for the same (learnerId, lessonId).
completedAt.title: Completed At

x-property-rbac._comment: Progress-tracking rows are per-student PII and a teaching-relevant signal. Learner sees own rows; any teacher or admin sees all — the RBAC dialect grants role-wide (there is no existing precedent in this register for a cross-object 'teacher of this specific course's cohort' match; `match` only compares a self field to $userId), mirroring CompetencyAttainment's admin/role+self shape, the most recently established analogous block.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the enrolled learner.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

learnerRef.description: UUID reference to the LearnerProfile object — the portal-subject scoping key (ADR-046 A4). Distinct from learnerId, which is the Nextcloud user id. Additive and optional; existing rows leave it unset and stay invisible to the portal (fail-closed) until backfilled.
learnerRef.title: Learner Ref

courseId.description: UUID of the Course object in the scholiq register.
courseId.title: Course ID

mandatory.description: When true this enrolment is a compliance-mandatory assignment.
mandatory.title: Mandatory Enrolment

dueDate.description: ISO date by which the learner must complete the course. Null means no deadline.
dueDate.title: Due Date

source.description: Origin of the enrolment record. admission is stamped by ApplicationConversionHandler on Application placement; subject-choice is stamped by SubjectChoiceEnrolmentBridge when a SubjectChoice locks (admissions-and-subject-choice).
source.title: Enrolment Source

managerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner's line manager. Used for overdue alerts and fallback notifications.
managerId.title: Manager ID

bulkJobId.description: Browser-generated UUID grouping all Enrolments created by a single bulk-enrol modal submission. Used for polling progress.
bulkJobId.title: Bulk Job ID

reason.description: Free-text reason captured on withdrawal or failure transitions.
reason.title: Reason

regulationSlug.description: Machine-readable slug of the linked compliance regulation, e.g. 'avg-2018'. Used by compliance-audit to group evidence.

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort this enrolment is associated with. Null for individually enrolled learners not in a cohort.
cohortId.title: Cohort ID

lifecycle.description: Enrolment lifecycle state. Managed by the OR lifecycle engine; do not set directly.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

progressPercent.description: Percentage of the Course's published Lessons the learner has completed (completedLessonCount / totalPublishedLessonCount * 100, rounded; null-safe — reads 0 when either count is 0, never a divide-by-zero error). Derived — do not set manually. Mirrors FinalGrade.value's own 'Derived — do not set manually' shape; recomputed by EnrolmentProgressRollupHandler via EnrolmentProgressEvaluator whenever a LessonCompletion for this learner+course is created or updated (learning-progress-and-analytics).
progressPercent.title: Progress Percent

completedLessonCount.description: Declarative read-surface for the completedLessonCount aggregate-ref, mirroring Course.lessonCount's identical '@aggregate.<name>' idiom.

totalPublishedLessonCount.description: Declarative read-surface for the totalPublishedLessonCount aggregate-ref, mirroring Course.lessonCount's identical '@aggregate.<name>' idiom.

calculatedChange.description: Recompute progressPercent whenever a LessonCompletion for this (learnerId, courseId) is created or updated. Implemented via EnrolmentProgressRollupHandler listening on ObjectCreatedEvent<LessonCompletion> — NOT a TimedJob (ADR-022). Mirrors FinalGrade's own x-openregister-triggers block.

AdmissionsRound.title: AdmissionsRound
AdmissionsRound.description: The norm configuration for one intake round, scoped to a Programme (or a whole level when programmeId is null) and academicYear — mirrors BsaTrajectory's role as the shared per-round rule row an Application-scoped guard/handler reads. kind selects which legal branch AdmissionsDecisionGuard applies (mbo-toelatingsrecht, vo-schooladvies-doorstroomtoets, or generic). applicationDeadline and capacity are institution-set with no hardcoded default, mirroring BsaTrajectory.normEcts/AttendanceThreshold's null-scoping precedent.

kind.description: Legal profile. mbo-toelatingsrecht applies the WEB toelatingsrecht safeguard (apply before applicationDeadline + complete mandatory intake ⇒ right to admission). vo-schooladvies-doorstroomtoets applies the upward schooladvies-adjustment rule. generic applies only the capacity branch.
kind.title: Round Kind

programmeId.description: UUID of the Programme this round admits into. Null = the round scopes every Programme at the declared level in the tenant, mirroring AttendanceThreshold.cohortId's null-scoping convention.
programmeId.title: Programme ID

level.description: Education or training level this round admits into. Matches Programme.level.
level.title: Education Level

academicYear.description: Academic year this round applies to, e.g. '2026-2027'.
academicYear.title: Academic Year

applicationDeadline.description: Institution-set deadline by which an Application must be submitted for the mbo-toelatingsrecht safeguard to apply (e.g. the statutory 1 April date). No schema default — the deadline is institution/instance policy, not a Scholiq constant, mirroring BsaTrajectory.normEcts' identical reasoning. Null = no deadline is enforced by AdmissionsDecisionGuard's toelatingsrecht branch.
applicationDeadline.title: Application Deadline

mandatoryIntake.description: Whether an intake conversation is mandatory before an Application can reach intake-completed. When true, AdmissionsDecisionGuard blocks the completeIntake transition until Application.intakeCompleted is true.
mandatoryIntake.title: Mandatory Intake

capacity.description: Maximum number of placed/converted Applications this round admits. Null = uncapped. Counted live at decision time by AdmissionsDecisionGuard — not materialised on this row (mirrors BsaTrajectory's own 'no per-round running count' rejection in design.md, avoiding a race between concurrent placed transitions).
capacity.title: Capacity

lifecycle.description: Round lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

Application.title: Application
Application.description: An aanmelding for a Programme — the pre-enrolment intake path for PO→VO, VO/HO→MBO, and generic admissions (Studielink/HE intake stays on Enrolment; this schema covers every other channel). Scored by a coordinator through an intake conversation to a placed/waitlisted/rejected decision, gated by AdmissionsDecisionGuard for the round's legal branch (kind on the referenced AdmissionsRound). On placement, ApplicationConversionHandler converts the Application into a LearnerProfile and Enrolment rows. guardianId/guardianRef copy ConferenceSignup's ADR-046 dual-identity pair verbatim — no second guardian-account mechanism is introduced.

applicantBirthDate.description: Date of birth of the applicant, if known at intake.
applicantBirthDate.title: Applicant Birth Date

priorSchool.description: Free-text name of the applicant's prior school or programme, if any.
priorSchool.title: Prior School

admissionsRoundId.description: UUID of the AdmissionsRound this application belongs to. Governs the applicationDeadline/mandatoryIntake/capacity checked by AdmissionsDecisionGuard.
admissionsRoundId.title: Admissions Round ID

programmeId.description: UUID of the Programme applied for. ApplicationConversionHandler bulk-enrols the learner into this Programme's courseIds on placement.
programmeId.title: Programme ID

guardianId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the guardian, when the family already has an NC/LearnerProfile presence (e.g. a sibling application). Null for the common case of no existing Scholiq identity at intake time — reuses ConferenceSignup.guardianId's shape verbatim.
guardianId.title: Guardian ID

guardianRef.description: UUID reference to the guardian's own domain identity (ADR-046 A4) — the portal scope-stamp reused from ConferenceSignup.guardianRef, stamped onto the converted LearnerProfile.guardianRefs on placement. Additive and optional; null until the family is linked via the portal.
guardianRef.title: Guardian Ref

guardianGivenName.description: Free-text first name of the guardian, captured when no NC account or LearnerProfile exists yet.
guardianGivenName.title: Guardian Given Name

guardianFamilyName.description: Free-text last name of the guardian, captured when no NC account or LearnerProfile exists yet.
guardianFamilyName.title: Guardian Family Name

guardianEmail.description: Free-text contact email of the guardian, captured when no NC account or LearnerProfile exists yet.
guardianEmail.title: Guardian Email

guardianPhone.description: Free-text contact phone number of the guardian, captured when no NC account or LearnerProfile exists yet.
guardianPhone.title: Guardian Phone

submittedAuthLevel.description: eIDAS assurance level of the submission flow, reusing ExcuseRequest.submittedAuthLevel's shape verbatim. Defaults to 'none' — Application creation is staff-assisted (front desk / intake coordinator), not a DigiD-authenticated guardian flow, per design.md's Non-Goals.
submittedAuthLevel.title: Submission Assurance Level

requiredDocuments.description: Required intake documents, each referencing an OpenRegister Material attachment — this app stores no file bytes of its own, reusing school-structure's established Material-reference rule.

kind.description: Document category.
kind.title: Document Kind

materialId.description: UUID of the Material object carrying the OpenRegister file attachment.
materialId.title: Material ID

requiredDocuments.title: Required Documents

intakeScheduledAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the intake conversation is scheduled for. A plain date-time — no room/timetable conflict resolution, mirroring Session.location's 'just a string' posture.
intakeScheduledAt.title: Intake Scheduled At

intakeConductedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of the coordinator who conducted the intake conversation.
intakeConductedBy.title: Intake Conducted By

intakeNotes.description: Free-text notes from the intake conversation.
intakeNotes.title: Intake Notes

intakeCompleted.description: Whether the intake conversation has been recorded as held. AdmissionsDecisionGuard blocks the completeIntake transition when the round's mandatoryIntake is true and this is still false.
intakeCompleted.title: Intake Completed

studiekeuzeadviesGiven.description: MBO toelatingsrecht branch: whether the studiekeuzeadvies (study-choice advice) has been given. One of the three preconditions AdmissionsDecisionGuard checks before blocking a rejection.
studiekeuzeadviesGiven.title: Studiekeuzeadvies Given

studiekeuzeadviesGivenAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the studiekeuzeadvies was given.
studiekeuzeadviesGivenAt.title: Studiekeuzeadvies Given At

schooladviesLevel.description: VO branch: the primary school's preliminary schooladvies, on the shared low→high ordinal AdmissionsDecisionGuard compares against doorstroomtoetsLevel.
schooladviesLevel.title: Schooladvies Level

doorstroomtoetsLevel.description: VO branch: the doorstroomtoets result, on the same shared ordinal as schooladviesLevel.
doorstroomtoetsLevel.title: Doorstroomtoets Level

schooladviesAdjustedLevel.description: VO branch: the schooladvies after any upward adjustment. AdmissionsDecisionGuard requires this to equal doorstroomtoetsLevel when the toets outranks the original schooladviesLevel, unless adjustmentMotivation is given or the pro/vmbo-bb exemption applies.
schooladviesAdjustedLevel.title: Schooladvies Adjusted Level

adjustmentMotivation.description: VO branch: free-text motivation for NOT raising schooladviesAdjustedLevel to match a higher doorstroomtoetsLevel — the 'not in the pupil's best interest' exception. Non-empty satisfies AdmissionsDecisionGuard's adjustment requirement.
adjustmentMotivation.title: Adjustment Motivation

adviesNote.description: VO branch: free-text note for a combined advice (e.g. 'vmbo-gt/havo') recorded as its lower single-track value plus this note — combined advices are out of scope for the ordinal comparison itself.
adviesNote.title: Advies Note

decisionType.description: The intake decision outcome. Mirrors the lifecycle state reached, kept as an explicit field for reporting stability across any future re-lifecycle.
decisionType.title: Decision Type

decisionReason.description: Free-text reason for the decision. Required (non-empty) to reject an mbo-toelatingsrecht applicant who applied on time and completed a mandatory intake with a given studiekeuzeadvies — enforced by AdmissionsDecisionGuard, not by JSON Schema required, since the requirement is conditional on the round's kind.
decisionReason.title: Decision Reason

decidedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of the coordinator who recorded the decision.
decidedBy.title: Decided By

convertedLearnerProfileId.description: UUID of the LearnerProfile created by ApplicationConversionHandler on placement. Null until converted.
convertedLearnerProfileId.title: Converted Learner Profile ID

convertedEnrolmentIds.description: UUIDs of the Enrolment rows created by ApplicationConversionHandler on placement, one per Programme.courseIds entry. Empty/null until converted.
convertedEnrolmentIds.title: Converted Enrolment IDs

submittedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the application was submitted. Compared against AdmissionsRound.applicationDeadline by the toelatingsrecht branch, and used to order waitlist promotion oldest-first.
submittedAt.title: Submitted At

lifecycle.description: Application lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

promote.description: Driven by AdmissionsWaitlistPromoter when a placed Application for the same round transitions to withdrawn/rejected — promotes the oldest-submittedAt waitlisted Application, re-running AdmissionsDecisionGuard's capacity branch.

convert.description: Driven by ApplicationConversionHandler after it creates the LearnerProfile and Enrolment rows.

x-openregister-authorization._comment: admissions-and-subject-choice: first change to ever write this schema — an intake coordinator/front-desk staff member creates the Application on behalf of a family that usually has no NC account yet, so create must be reachable by an authenticated user, not admin-only. Mirrors secure-exam-test-mode's identical 'no dedicated intake-coordinator role today' rationale (lib/Settings/scholiq_register.json:6620). Object-level scoping (only the assigned coordinator/admin can decide) is a known platform gap, the same one already documented for secure-exam-test-mode and SupportRequest — not solved here, not silently ignored.

Regulation.title: Regulation
Regulation.description: Compliance regulation (AVG, BIO, NIS2, etc.) tracked for mandatory training coverage.

description.description: Plain-language description of the regulation and its applicability.
description.title: Regulation Description

applicabilityCriteria.description: Free-text applicability criteria describing which roles or departments must comply.
applicabilityCriteria.title: Applicability Criteria

requiresAnnualRenewal.description: Whether this regulation requires annual recertification.
requiresAnnualRenewal.title: Requires Annual Renewal

renewalCycleMonths.description: Renewal cycle in months (e.g. 12 for annual).

active.description: Whether this regulation is currently enforced.
active.title: Active

ragRedThreshold.description: Coverage % below which RAG status is red.
ragRedThreshold.title: RAG Red Threshold

ragAmberThreshold.description: Coverage % below which RAG status is amber (and at or above ragRedThreshold).
ragAmberThreshold.title: RAG Amber Threshold

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

coveragePercent.description: Live coverage % = (mandatoryCompletedCount / mandatoryEnrolledCount) × 100. Returns 0 when no enrolments exist.

ragStatus.description: RAG status band: green ≥ ragAmberThreshold, amber ≥ ragRedThreshold, red < ragRedThreshold.

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Record that a learner completed mandatory compliance training (AVG / BIO / NIS2 / Cyberbeveiligingswet) and capture the signed attestation as legal evidence, including the actor's IP address for non-repudiation.

Attestation.title: Attestation

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID or external learner identifier.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

lessonId.description: ID of the Lesson that was attested.
lessonId.title: Lesson ID

courseId.description: ID of the Course containing the attested lesson.
courseId.title: Course ID

regulationSlug.description: Slug of the Regulation this attestation is captured for.
regulationSlug.title: Regulation Slug

actorIp.description: IP address of the learner at time of attestation, for audit purposes.
actorIp.title: Actor IP Address

employeeId.description: HR system employee identifier, if available.
employeeId.title: Employee ID

score.description: Assessment score at time of attestation, if applicable.

xapiStatementId.description: ID of the cmi5.completed XapiStatement that triggered this attestation.
xapiStatementId.title: xAPI Statement ID

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Record training a learner completed outside the LMS (classroom, third-party, conference) as first-class compliance evidence, with an officer verification gate and evidence file attachments, so that compliance coverage reflects real-world completions instead of forcing fake in-app enrolments.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (verified external-training records are compliance evidence, typically retained per the school selectielijst alongside attestations)

ExternalTrainingRecord.title: ExternalTrainingRecord
ExternalTrainingRecord.description: An externally-completed training (classroom, third-party e-learning, conference, on-the-job) recorded per learner with evidence file attachments and an officer verification gate. A verified, unexpired record counts as compliance evidence for a matching regulation.

learnerId.description: UUID of the LearnerProfile this record belongs to.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

title.description: Human-readable training title, e.g. "NIS2 board awareness session".
title.title: Training Title

kind.description: Kind of external training.
kind.title: Training Kind

regulationSlug.description: Optional Regulation.slug this training provides coverage for (links into compliance coverage). Null = no regulation link.
regulationSlug.title: Regulation Slug

courseId.description: Optional UUID of an in-app Course considered equivalent.

validUntil.description: Optional expiry of the coverage this record provides. When set and in the past, the record no longer counts toward coverage.
validUntil.title: Valid Until

evidenceNote.description: Free-text note describing the evidence (e.g. "signed attendance list attached").
evidenceNote.title: Evidence Note

submittedBy.description: NC user ID of the person who recorded the training.
submittedBy.title: Submitted By

verifiedBy.description: NC user ID of the officer/HR/admin who verified the record. Must differ from submittedBy when the learner self-submitted.
verifiedBy.title: Verified By

rejectionReason.description: Reason captured when the record is rejected.
rejectionReason.title: Rejection Reason

credentialId.description: Optional UUID of a manual Credential issued on verification (links external certificates into the certification expiry machinery).
credentialId.title: Credential ID

batchId.description: Identifier shared by all records created together in one bulk classroom-session entry, so a batch can be verified and audited together.
batchId.title: Batch ID

lifecycle.description: Verification lifecycle state.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

subject.nl: Nieuwe externe training '{{title}}' wacht op verificatie

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Maintain the core learner record (identity, school enrolment, affiliation, guardians) required to deliver education, register results, and meet statutory reporting obligations. Includes the encrypted BSN, ECK iD, and SchoolID used for pseudonymised exchange.

LearnerProfile.title: LearnerProfile
LearnerProfile.description: Scholiq learner profile. Owns role assignment and is the actor reference for enrolments, credentials, and attestations.

ncUserId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner.
ncUserId.title: Nextcloud User ID

bsnEncrypted.description: Encrypted BSN — only populated for K-12 or government tenants. MUST be the base64-encoded ICrypto ciphertext; raw/plaintext BSNs are rejected by the minLength + pattern constraints below.
bsnEncrypted.title: Encrypted BSN

eckId.description: ECK iD for Dutch education identity federation.
eckId.title: ECK iD

roles.description: One or more Scholiq roles. The highest-priority role is materialised as primaryRole.
roles.title: Scholiq Roles

parentIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of linked parent/guardian accounts.
parentIds.title: Parent / Guardian IDs

guardianRefs.description: UUID references to the guardian domain object(s) linked to this learner — the parent-audience portal linkage (ADR-046 A4). Distinct from parentIds, which are Nextcloud user ids. The portal resolves parent->learner via a one-hop join: it matches the parent subject's guardianRef against this array to find the child LearnerProfile, then reads that learner's records by learnerRef. Additive and optional; existing rows leave it unset (fail-closed) until backfilled.
guardianRefs.title: Guardian Refs

managerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner's line manager.
managerId.title: Manager ID

department.description: Organisational department for grouping and reporting.
department.title: Department

mergedInto.description: UUID of the surviving LearnerProfile this profile was merged into. Set by the merge transition; null for active profiles.
mergedInto.title: Merged Into

lifecycle.description: Profile lifecycle state: active (in use), merged (duplicate merged into another profile; retained for audit), deleted (soft-deleted on offboarding; retained per AVG retention class until purge window expires). Managed by the OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

merge.description: Merges this profile into another LearnerProfile. The surviving profile is referenced via mergedInto.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the profile on offboarding. Purge after retention class expires.

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): learner-profile contains personal data (parentIds, department, etc.). Learner sees own profile; admins see all.

Programme.title: Programme
Programme.description: A named educational or training track (HBO-V bachelor, NIS2 board certification, vmbo-tl examenjaar). Aggregates courses, declares a credential to issue on completion, and points at one CurriculumPlan.

description.description: Plain-language description of the programme.
description.title: Programme Description

curriculumPlanId.description: UUID of the governing CurriculumPlan. Null until a plan is assigned.
curriculumPlanId.title: Curriculum Plan ID

courseIds.description: Ordered list of Course UUIDs that form the programme's content spine.
courseIds.title: Course IDs

credentialTemplateId.description: UUID of the Credential template to issue on programme completion. Null = no auto-issuance.
credentialTemplateId.title: Credential Template ID

requiredCompetencyIds.description: UUIDs of Competency taxonomy nodes (competency capability) a learner must attain to complete this programme — the 'required by Programme' half of the skills-gap view (the other half, 'required by role', is declared on Competency.requiredForRoles). Additive field — existing rows leave it empty.
requiredCompetencyIds.title: Required Competency IDs

lifecycle.description: Programme lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

CurriculumPlan.title: CurriculumPlan
CurriculumPlan.description: The governing assessment plan for a Programme. Carries the ordered component list (kolommen), weight per component, roll-up formula, grade scale, pass rules, and period structure. Profiles: PTA (Dutch VO), OER/studiegids (HE), opleidingsplan (MBO), training-curriculum (corporate), generic.

kind.description: Profile of this curriculum plan.
kind.title: Plan Profile

requiredCourseIds.description: UUIDs of courses that are mandatory in this plan.
requiredCourseIds.title: Required Course IDs

electiveCourseIds.description: UUIDs of elective / optional courses in this plan.
electiveCourseIds.title: Elective Course IDs

components.description: Assessment component definitions (kolommen). Each entry maps to one grade component with its weight, period, and kind.

componentId.description: Stable identifier for this component within the plan.
componentId.title: Component ID

weight.description: Relative weight of this component in the roll-up formula. E.g. 3 means this kolom contributes 3x.
weight.title: Component Weight

period.description: Period identifier or number this component belongs to.
period.title: Period

kind.description: Component category.
kind.title: Component Kind

components.title: Assessment Components

formula.description: Roll-up formula for computing the final grade from weighted components.
formula.title: Roll-Up Formula

gradeScaleId.description: UUID of the GradeScale object (grading spec). Null = default 1-10 Dutch scale.
gradeScaleId.title: Grade Scale ID

componentId.description: If set: applies to that specific component. If null: applies to the final grade.
componentId.title: Component ID

minValue.description: Minimum passing value (e.g. 5.5 on Dutch 1-10 scale).
minValue.title: Minimum Pass Value

periods.description: Period definitions (e.g. SE-periodes for PTA, blokken for HE).
periods.title: Assessment Periods

gradeVisibilityPolicy.description: Default scheduled-visibility policy applied to GradeEntry notifications published under this plan when a teacher does not explicitly override visibleFrom. Null resolves to mode 'immediate' — today's behaviour (notify as soon as a GradeEntry publishes) — so every existing CurriculumPlan is unaffected until a school opts in.

mode.description: Visibility scheduling mode. 'immediate' = the resolved visibleFrom equals the publish moment. 'nextSchoolDay' = the resolved visibleFrom is the next non-weekend day at 'time' in 'timezone'.
mode.title: Visibility Mode

time.description: Local time of day (HH:MM, 24h) at which deferred grades become visible. Only meaningful when mode is 'nextSchoolDay'.
time.title: Visibility Time

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier used to interpret 'time'. Only meaningful when mode is 'nextSchoolDay'.
timezone.title: Timezone

gradeVisibilityPolicy.title: Grade Visibility Policy

electiveRules.description: Elective-selection validation rules for this plan's electiveCourseIds, read by SubjectChoiceValidator when a SubjectChoice referencing this plan submits (admissions-and-subject-choice). Additive and nullable; every existing CurriculumPlan row remains valid with this unset (fail-closed — no rule is enforced until a school opts in).

minElectives.description: Minimum number of electiveCourseIds a SubjectChoice must select. Null = no minimum.
minElectives.title: Minimum Electives

maxElectives.description: Maximum number of electiveCourseIds a SubjectChoice may select. Null = no maximum.
maxElectives.title: Maximum Electives

mandatoryCombinations.description: Course-id sets that must be chosen together — a SubjectChoice selecting part of a set without the rest fails validation.
mandatoryCombinations.title: Mandatory Combinations

mutuallyExclusive.description: Course-id sets that cannot be chosen together — a SubjectChoice selecting more than one course from the same set fails validation.
mutuallyExclusive.title: Mutually Exclusive Combinations

sessionDayBucket.description: Deterministic day-bucket number (whole calendar days since a fixed 1970-01-01 epoch) derived from startsAt, ignoring time-of-day. Two Sessions on the same calendar date share the same bucket value, so AttendanceFlag.schoolDaysSinceFlag can count DISTINCT school days via count_distinct on this field instead of on the raw startsAt date-time (which would overcount days with multiple sessions). Added because OpenRegister's declarative calculation DSL (verified at HEAD across this register: dateDiff/dateAdd/if/case/eq/ne/gt/gte/lt/lte/and/or/prop/now — no string-format or date-truncation primitive) exposes no direct date-truncation operator. See verzuim-report-composer design.md task 1.2.

drawCount.description: Number of items to draw per attempt.
drawCount.title: Draw Count

subjectTags.description: Optional Item.subjectTags filter. Empty = no subject-tag filter.
subjectTags.title: Subject Tags Filter

difficultyMin.description: Optional lower bound (inclusive) on Item.difficulty. Null = no lower bound.
difficultyMin.title: Minimum Difficulty

difficultyMax.description: Optional upper bound (inclusive) on Item.difficulty. Null = no upper bound.
difficultyMax.title: Maximum Difficulty

shuffleItemOrder.description: When true, the presentation order of the resolved item list (fixed or random-draw) is independently permuted per attempt by AssessmentDrawResolver.
shuffleItemOrder.title: Shuffle Item Order

shuffleAnswerOptions.description: When true, the presentation order of each choice-bearing item's answer options is independently permuted per attempt by AssessmentDrawResolver, respecting QTI 3.0's fixed attribute on individual simpleChoice options.
shuffleAnswerOptions.title: Shuffle Answer Options

itemAnalysisConfig.description: Per-Assessment override of ItemAnalysisService's minimum-sample-size and quality-threshold defaults. Null = use the schema defaults listed on each property below. A low-stakes formative quiz and a high-stakes tentamen can legitimately warrant different quality bars.
itemAnalysisConfig.title: Item Analysis Configuration

minSampleSize.description: Minimum graded AssessmentResults referencing an item before pValue/itemTotalCorrelation/distractorAnalysis are computed instead of left null.
minSampleSize.title: Minimum Sample Size (Item Statistics)

reliabilityMinSampleSize.description: Minimum graded AssessmentResults for the assessment before cronbachAlpha is computed instead of left null.
reliabilityMinSampleSize.title: Minimum Sample Size (Reliability)

tooDifficultyBelow.description: pValue below this value opens an ItemRevisionFlag with reason too-difficult.

tooEasyAbove.description: pValue above this value opens an ItemRevisionFlag with reason too-easy.
tooEasyAbove.title: Too-Easy p-value Threshold

lowDiscriminationBelow.description: itemTotalCorrelation below this value (and >= 0) opens an ItemRevisionFlag with reason low-discrimination; a negative value opens reason negative-discrimination instead.
lowDiscriminationBelow.title: Low-Discrimination Correlation Threshold

scoringScheme.description: Scoring scheme: points (raw total), passMark (threshold), or IRT.
scoringScheme.title: Scoring Scheme

passMark.description: Minimum score to pass. Required when scoringScheme is passMark.
passMark.title: Pass Mark

timeLimitMinutes.description: Time limit in minutes. Null = untimed.
timeLimitMinutes.title: Time Limit (Minutes)

maxAttempts.description: Maximum number of attempts a learner may make.
maxAttempts.title: Maximum Attempts

keepScore.description: Which attempt score to use when maxAttempts > 1.
keepScore.title: Score Retention Policy

availableFrom.description: ISO-8601 datetime from which the assessment is available to learners.

availableUntil.description: ISO-8601 datetime after which the assessment is no longer available.
availableUntil.title: Available Until

provider.description: Proctoring adapter identifier; resolves to ProvidesProctoring.

lockdownBrowser.description: Enable lockdown browser integration. When nativeTestMode is set, requests browser Fullscreen API and logs exits as flags — not an OS-level kiosk client.

recordWebcam.description: Enable webcam recording. Not applicable when nativeTestMode is set — native mode never requests camera/microphone access.
recordWebcam.title: Record Webcam

flagReviewMode.description: Flag review mode. ai-assisted requires the AI feature with slug assessment-ai-proctor-review to be enabled in the central Hermiq governance register (ADR-005).
flagReviewMode.title: Flag Review Mode

nativeTestMode.title: Native Test Mode

navigationLock.description: When nativeTestMode is set: warn on tab close/reload and log blocked back-navigation attempts as blocked-navigation flags.
