mentorId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner's mentor, resolved from LearnerProfile.managerId at flag creation.
mentorId.title: Mentor ID

interventions.description: Append-only log of the school's handling history (mentor contact attempts, agreements reached, escalations) recorded while the flag is open/in-handling. Each addition MUST be a new audited version of the appendOnly flag (ADR-008) — never an in-place edit of a prior entry. Composed into the verzuimloket dossier alongside breachingRecordIds for target=leerplicht (see data-exchange spec).

recordedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of the mentor/coordinator who recorded this intervention.
recordedBy.title: Recorded By

recordedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this intervention was recorded.
recordedAt.title: Recorded At

note.description: Free-text description of the intervention (contact attempt, agreement reached, escalation).
note.title: Note

lifecycleAtRecording.description: The flag's lifecycle state at the moment this intervention was recorded (e.g. open, in-handling). Null when not captured.
lifecycleAtRecording.title: Lifecycle At Recording

interventions.title: Interventions

lifecycle.description: Flag lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

schoolDaysSinceFlag.description: Count of DISTINCT school days (calendar dates carrying >=1 scheduled Session, grouped via Session.sessionDayBucket to avoid overcounting multi-session days) on or after windowEnd — the statutory 5-school-day Leerplichtwet art. 21a reporting-deadline count. Vacation/closure weeks schedule no Sessions and so contribute zero, without a separate vacation calendar (see design.md 'Reuse Session occurrence' decision). ASSUMPTION (unverified against OpenRegister core, which is not present in this repo): the aggregation engine's `where` clause supports a range comparison ({gte: ...}) against a `@self.*` reference the same way `x-openregister-notifications.trigger.condition` does; flag for confirmation during review.

daysSinceFlag.description: Number of days since the flag was created (windowEnd as proxy). Helps the mentor dashboard sort by urgency.

reportOverdue.description: True once the statutory 5-school-day reporting deadline (Leerplichtwet art. 21a) has been reached or passed while the flag has not yet reached reported/resolved. Computed directly from the vacation-aware schoolDaysSinceFlag aggregation, so closure weeks are correctly excluded from the count. Informational only — does NOT alter AttendanceFlagReportGuard's in-handling to reported transition gate.

reportDeadlineAt.description: Display estimate of the statutory reporting deadline: windowEnd + 7 calendar days. This is an INFORMATIONAL APPROXIMATION, not the authoritative signal — OpenRegister's declarative calculation DSL (verified at HEAD across this register: dateDiff/dateAdd/if/case/eq/ne/gt/gte/lt/lte/and/or/prop/now) exposes no operator to resolve 'the calendar date of the Nth matching related object', so it cannot itself skip a specific vacation week the way schoolDaysSinceFlag/reportOverdue do. reportOverdue (computed from the true vacation-aware school-day count) is the authoritative overdue signal and the one the reportDeadlineOverdue notification fires from; reportDeadlineAt is UI guidance only.

BsaTrajectory.title: BsaTrajectory
BsaTrajectory.description: The bindend studieadvies (BSA) norm configuration for a Programme + academicYear (optionally scoped to one Cohort). Carries the institution-set normEcts (no hardcoded default — the statutory ~30-EC floor was a paused, unenacted proposal per rijksoverheid.nl), the interim-check window (fixed-date for the HE 1-februari/studiefinanciering profile, relative-months for the MBO WEB art. 8.1.7a profile), and the pace-adjusted interimNormEcts used only for the ahead-of-guideline flag. Per-learner ectsEarned is computed by BsaProgressEvaluator and stamped onto BsaProgressFlag when a learner falls at risk (BsaTrajectory itself is a shared per-programme rule row, not a per-learner record — mirrors AttendanceThreshold).

programmeId.description: UUID of the Programme this BSA trajectory governs.
programmeId.title: Programme ID

academicYear.description: Academic year this trajectory applies to, e.g. '2026-2027'.
academicYear.title: Academic Year

kind.description: Profile kind. he-eerstejaar-bsa is the HE first-year fixed-date/studiefinanciering profile; mbo-studieadvies is the WEB art. 8.1.7a relative-months profile; generic is either mode for non-statutory (e.g. corporate) trajectories.
kind.title: Trajectory Kind

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort this trajectory overrides for. Null = applies to all cohorts in the Programme + academicYear.
cohortId.title: Cohort ID

normEcts.description: Institution-set year-end credit norm (capped at the first-year credit total per rijksoverheid.nl). No schema default — a statutory floor was proposed and paused, never enacted; shipping a hardcoded value would misstate the law.
normEcts.title: Year-End Credit Norm (EC)

window.description: Interim-check window definition. mode selects which of the remaining fields apply, mirroring AttendanceThreshold.window's rolling-weeks/fixed-term duality.

mode.description: Window mode. fixed-date = one calendar date per academic year (HE profile). relative-months = a number of months relative to referenceDate (MBO profile).
mode.title: Window Mode

date.description: Calendar date the interim check opens (used when mode is fixed-date). Institution-set — NOT hardcoded to 1 February; the legal driver is protecting studiefinanciering, which depends on the institution's own academic calendar.
date.title: Fixed Check Date

referenceDate.description: The date afterMonths/notEarlierThanMonths count from when mode is relative-months (typically the cohort's own start date). Set explicitly — Cohort carries no start-date field to derive it from.
referenceDate.title: Relative Window Reference Date

afterMonths.description: Months after referenceDate the interim check opens (used when mode is relative-months). WEB art. 8.1.7a: within 4 months of a one-year programme's start.
afterMonths.title: Months After Reference Date

notEarlierThanMonths.description: Earliest number of months after referenceDate the check may open (used when mode is relative-months). WEB art. 8.1.7a: not earlier than 3 months.
notEarlierThanMonths.title: Not Earlier Than Months

window.title: Interim Check Window

interimNormEcts.description: Pace-adjusted threshold used only to flag 'at risk ahead of the guideline' at the interim check. Never gates the year-end decision — that always compares against normEcts.
interimNormEcts.title: Interim Credit Norm (EC)

onAtRisk.description: Action to take when a learner is detected at risk ahead of the interim-check window.

notify.description: Whether to send notifications to notifyRoles.
notify.title: Send Notification

notifyRoles.description: Tenant roles to notify when a learner is flagged at risk.
notifyRoles.title: Notify Roles

createFlag.description: Whether to create a BsaProgressFlag when a learner is detected at risk.
createFlag.title: Create Progress Flag

onAtRisk.title: On At-Risk Detected

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

passedFinalGrades.description: Cross-schema aggregation: the learner's passed:true FinalGrades for a Course in this trajectory's Programme. Read by BsaProgressEvaluator (a per-learner PHP computation triggered by BsaProgressFlagHandler on GradeEntry.published — NOT auto-materialised on this shared per-programme row, since a single BsaTrajectory row cannot hold every learner's distinct ectsEarned value). Documents the same cross-schema-join shape FinalGrade.value already uses via GradeFormulaEvaluator.

windowOpensAt.description: The interim-check window's opening date, resolved from window.mode. fixed-date resolves to window.date directly; relative-months resolves to window.referenceDate + window.afterMonths. Pure JSON-logic — reuses the @now-comparison idiom already exercised by Enrolment.isOverdue; no PHP engine for the date arithmetic itself.

BsaProgressFlag.title: BsaProgressFlag
BsaProgressFlag.description: Created when a learner's ectsEarned (computed by BsaProgressEvaluator) falls below their BsaTrajectory's interimNormEcts once the interim-check window has opened. appendOnly: true per ADR-008 (immutable audit evidence). Tracks the study-advisor's intervention and any resulting BsaWarning via its lifecycle. It NEVER auto-acts against the learner — human-in-the-loop throughout, mirroring AttendanceFlag.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner who fell below the interim norm.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

programmeId.description: UUID of the Programme in scope.
programmeId.title: Programme ID

bsaTrajectoryId.description: UUID of the BsaTrajectory whose interim norm was crossed.
bsaTrajectoryId.title: BSA Trajectory ID

academicYear.description: Academic year this flag applies to, copied from the BsaTrajectory at flag creation.
academicYear.title: Academic Year

ectsEarned.description: The learner's ectsEarned at the moment of flagging, computed by BsaProgressEvaluator.
ectsEarned.title: Credits Earned At Flag (EC)

ectsRequiredAtCheck.description: The BsaTrajectory.interimNormEcts value at the moment of flagging.
ectsRequiredAtCheck.title: Credits Required At Check (EC)

flaggedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the flag was created.
flaggedAt.title: Flagged At

lifecycle.description: Flag lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

subject.nl: Een leerling loopt achter op het BSA-tempo
subject.en: A learner is falling behind BSA pace

EngagementScore.title: EngagementScore
EngagementScore.description: Calculated per-learner, per-Course engagement roll-up — activityCount (declarative aggregate-ref count of XapiStatement rows), timeOnTaskMinutes and score (PHP-computed by EngagementScoreEvaluator; summing nested XapiStatement.result duration data has no declarative sum operator anywhere in this register's calculation DSL), lastActivityAt (PHP-set) and recencyDays (a genuinely declarative materialise:true dateDiff, byte-for-byte the same idiom Enrolment.daysRemaining already uses). Recomputed by EngagementSignalHandler whenever a matching XapiStatement is received. No lifecycle — it is fully derived, mirroring FinalGrade. Read-only from the frontend. See openspec/changes/learning-progress-and-analytics/.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner this engagement score belongs to.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

learnerRef.description: UUID reference to the LearnerProfile object — the portal-subject scoping key (ADR-046 A4). Distinct from learnerId, which is the Nextcloud user id. Additive and optional; existing rows leave it unset and stay invisible to the portal (fail-closed) until backfilled.
learnerRef.title: Learner Ref

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this engagement score applies to.
courseId.title: Course ID

timeOnTaskMinutes.description: Sum of every matching XapiStatement.result duration extension, in minutes. A statement with no duration extension contributes 0, never an error. Derived — do not set manually. PHP-written by EngagementScoreEvaluator.
timeOnTaskMinutes.title: Time on Task (Minutes)

lastActivityAt.description: The max XapiStatement.timestamp across every matching statement. Derived — do not set manually. PHP-set by EngagementScoreEvaluator.
lastActivityAt.title: Last Activity At

score.description: Bounded 0-100 weighted combination of time-on-task (against the Course's summed Lesson.durationMinutes) and recency decay — a plain, documented formula, not a model. Derived — do not set manually. PHP-written by EngagementScoreEvaluator.
score.title: Engagement Score

activityCount.description: Declarative read-surface for the activityCount aggregate-ref — no PHP needed for a count, mirroring Course.lessonCount's identical '@aggregate.<name>' idiom.

recencyDays.description: Days since lastActivityAt. Null before any activity has been recorded. Byte-for-byte the same dateDiff-from-@now idiom Enrolment.daysRemaining already uses.

calculatedChange.description: Recompute this EngagementScore whenever an XapiStatement for this (learnerId, courseId) is received. Implemented via EngagementSignalHandler listening on ObjectCreatedEvent<XapiStatement> — NOT a TimedJob (ADR-022).

x-property-rbac._comment: Engagement data is per-student PII and a teaching-relevant signal, same reasoning as LessonCompletion. Learner sees own rows; any teacher or admin sees all.

EngagementRiskThreshold.title: EngagementRiskThreshold
EngagementRiskThreshold.description: Configurable threshold rule that watches a learner's or cohort's EngagementScore and fires when the metric crosses the limit. Structural mirror of AttendanceThreshold and BsaTrajectory (config: name/kind/scope/metric/limit/onAtRisk/lifecycle) — deliberately NOT scoped to HE/MBO or to Course.ectsCredits, applying to any Course/Cohort, closing the at-risk gap BsaTrajectory leaves for po/vo/corporate learners and for HE/MBO learners disengaging before any grade reflects it. Detection is a plain arithmetic/threshold comparison, evaluated by EngagementSignalHandler off the same XapiStatement event EngagementScoreEvaluator reacts to — NOT a TimedJob (ADR-022), and NOT an AI/ML inference call of any kind. See openspec/changes/learning-progress-and-analytics/.

kind.description: Profile kind.
kind.title: Threshold Kind

scope.description: Whether the threshold applies per individual learner or aggregated per cohort.
scope.title: Threshold Scope

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort this threshold applies to. Null = applies to all cohorts in the tenant.
cohortId.title: Cohort ID

metric.description: Metric being measured against EngagementScore.score or .recencyDays.
metric.title: Threshold Metric

onAtRisk.description: Action to take when the threshold is crossed.

notify.description: Whether to send notifications to notifyRoles.
notify.title: Send Notification

notifyRoles.description: Tenant roles to notify when a learner is flagged at risk.
notifyRoles.title: Notify Roles

createFlag.description: Whether to create an EngagementRiskFlag when a learner is detected at risk.
createFlag.title: Create Risk Flag

onAtRisk.title: On At-Risk Detected

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

x-openregister-authorization._comment: Threshold configuration, not learner data — mirrors AttendanceThreshold's implicit admin-configured posture and BsaWarning/FraudCase's explicit role-restricted create shape.

EngagementRiskFlag.title: EngagementRiskFlag
EngagementRiskFlag.description: Created when a learner's EngagementScore crosses an active EngagementRiskThreshold. appendOnly: true per ADR-008 (immutable audit evidence). Tracks the mentor/coordinator's intervention via its lifecycle. It NEVER auto-acts against the learner — human-in-the-loop throughout, mirroring AttendanceFlag/BsaProgressFlag. Idempotency-keyed by EngagementSignalHandler: no duplicate flag is created while one is already open/in-handling for the same learner+threshold; a resolved flag does not block a later relapse. See openspec/changes/learning-progress-and-analytics/.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner who crossed the threshold.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

courseId.description: UUID of the Course in context when the threshold was crossed.
courseId.title: Course ID

engagementRiskThresholdId.description: UUID of the EngagementRiskThreshold that was crossed.
engagementRiskThresholdId.title: Engagement Risk Threshold ID

engagementScoreId.description: UUID of the EngagementScore that crossed the threshold.
engagementScoreId.title: Engagement Score ID

metricValueAtFlag.description: The metric value (EngagementScore.score or .recencyDays, per the threshold's metric) at the moment of crossing.
metricValueAtFlag.title: Metric Value at Flag

flaggedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the flag was created.
flaggedAt.title: Flagged At

lifecycle.description: Flag lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

subject.nl: Een leerling loopt risico op onvoldoende betrokkenheid
subject.en: A learner is at risk of low engagement

x-openregister-authorization._comment: Handler-created only (EngagementSignalHandler runs server-side via ObjectService, not the REST create endpoint). No 'system' role exists in this register's RBAC vocabulary (verified: every x-openregister-authorization.create block in this file uses real tenant/NC-group role names — admin/hr/compliance-officer/study-advisor/exam-board/manager/principal — never a literal 'system'); admin-only mirrors XapiStatement's own precedent for the identical 'should be system-authored, engine has no system role' gap. No learner or teacher can author their own flag, same as BsaProgressFlag/AttendanceFlag's convention (those two ship no x-openregister-authorization.create block at all and rely on the handler being the only caller — this schema states the restriction explicitly instead).

x-property-rbac._comment: Human-in-the-loop at-risk evidence. Admin/coordinator/mentor see all; the flagged learner sees their own record only — mirrors BsaProgressFlag's posture.

BsaWarning.title: BsaWarning
BsaWarning.description: The formal early warning ('tijdige waarschuwing') required before a negative BSA decision can be defended on appeal. appendOnly: true per ADR-008; HMAC-signed at the drafted -> issued transition via BsaWarningSigningGuard, mirroring Attestation. Carries improvementPeriod and offeredGuidance (the 'sufficient study guidance' safeguard) and an optional personalCircumstancesNote.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the warned learner.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

programmeId.description: UUID of the Programme in scope.
programmeId.title: Programme ID

academicYear.description: Academic year this warning applies to.
academicYear.title: Academic Year

bsaProgressFlagId.description: UUID of the BsaProgressFlag this warning follows up on, if any. Null when the warning is issued without a preceding flag.
bsaProgressFlagId.title: BSA Progress Flag ID

ectsEarnedAtWarning.description: The learner's ectsEarned at the moment the warning was drafted.
ectsEarnedAtWarning.title: Credits Earned At Warning (EC)

ectsNormAtWarning.description: The governing BsaTrajectory.normEcts at the moment the warning was drafted.
ectsNormAtWarning.title: Credit Norm At Warning (EC)

improvementPeriod.description: The period the learner is given to improve before the year-end decision. Required (non-empty startDate/endDate) before this warning can be issued (BsaWarningSigningGuard).

startDate.description: First date of the improvement period given to the learner.
startDate.title: Improvement Period Start

endDate.description: Last date of the improvement period given to the learner.
endDate.title: Improvement Period End

improvementPeriod.title: Improvement Period

offeredGuidance.description: Free-text description of the study guidance offered to the learner — the 'sufficient study guidance' safeguard. Required non-empty before this warning can be issued (BsaWarningSigningGuard).
offeredGuidance.title: Offered Guidance

personalCircumstancesNote.description: Optional note on personal circumstances considered (disability, family situation, student-council membership) at the time of warning.
personalCircumstancesNote.title: Personal Circumstances Note

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature computed by BsaWarningSigningGuard at the drafted -> issued transition.
signature.title: HMAC Signature

signingKeyId.description: OR tenant-key rotation ID used to compute the signature. Required for offline verification.
signingKeyId.title: Signing Key ID

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

x-openregister-authorization._comment: A learner MUST NOT be able to author their own warning (design.md Security/Privacy Posture).

subject.nl: Je hebt een formele BSA-waarschuwing ontvangen
subject.en: You have received a formal BSA warning

BsaDecision.title: BsaDecision
BsaDecision.description: The year-end bindend studieadvies (BSA) decision, with a full evidence trail (credits, norm, referenced warnings, personal circumstances, right to be heard) that survives an appeal (bezwaar). appendOnly: true per ADR-008; HMAC-signed at the drafted -> decided transition via BsaDecisionGuard, which structurally blocks any negative* decision without at least one issued BsaWarning for the same learner+programme+academicYear.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner this decision is about.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

programmeId.description: UUID of the Programme in scope.
programmeId.title: Programme ID

academicYear.description: Academic year this decision applies to.
academicYear.title: Academic Year

decisionType.description: The BSA outcome. negative and negative-with-recommendation are subject to BsaDecisionGuard's warning requirement.
decisionType.title: Decision Type

ectsAchieved.description: The learner's ectsEarned at the moment of decision.
ectsAchieved.title: Credits Achieved (EC)

ectsNormRequired.description: The governing BsaTrajectory.normEcts at the moment of decision.
ectsNormRequired.title: Credit Norm Required (EC)

warningIds.description: UUIDs of the BsaWarnings this decision's evidence trail references. Must include at least one issued warning for a negative* decisionType (BsaDecisionGuard).
warningIds.title: Warning IDs

personalCircumstancesConsidered.description: Whether personal circumstances (disability, family situation, student-council membership) were considered before deciding.
personalCircumstancesConsidered.title: Personal Circumstances Considered

personalCircumstancesNote.description: Free-text note on the personal circumstances considered, if any.
personalCircumstancesNote.title: Personal Circumstances Note

studentHeardAt.description: When the student was heard before the decision — the hoorplicht (right to be heard) safeguard.
studentHeardAt.title: Student Heard At

studentResponse.description: Free-text summary of what the student said when heard.
studentResponse.title: Student Response

rationale.description: The decision's rationale. Required (non-empty) for a negative* decisionType — enforced by BsaDecisionGuard, not by JSON Schema required, since the requirement is conditional on decisionType.
rationale.title: Rationale

decidedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of the study-advisor/exam-board member who decided.
decidedBy.title: Decided By

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature computed by BsaDecisionGuard at the drafted -> decided transition.
signature.title: HMAC Signature

signingKeyId.description: OR tenant-key rotation ID used to compute the signature. Required for offline verification.
signingKeyId.title: Signing Key ID

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

x-openregister-authorization._comment: A learner MUST NOT be able to author their own decision (design.md Security/Privacy Posture).

DataMappingProfile.title: DataMappingProfile
DataMappingProfile.description: Declares how a Scholiq schema maps to an external target for data exchange. The mapping is used by DataExchangeJob to transform Scholiq objects into the payload sent to OpenConnector. No wire protocols are implemented here — the named target is an OpenConnector connection.

name.description: Human-readable name for this mapping profile (e.g. 'BRON/ROD learner export').
name.title: Mapping Profile Name

target.description: Named OpenConnector connection: bron-rod | oso | leerplicht | surfconext | hr | swv | or a custom name. This is a reference to an OpenConnector source/target configuration — Scholiq implements no wire protocol.
target.title: OpenConnector Target

direction.description: Direction of data flow: export (Scholiq → external), import (external → Scholiq), or sync (bidirectional).
direction.title: Data Flow Direction

sourceSchema.description: Slug of the Scholiq schema being mapped (e.g. 'learner-profile'). Any Scholiq schema can be a source.
sourceSchema.title: Source Schema

targetSchema.description: External schema identifier (free-form, e.g. 'DUO:LeerlingV2', 'OSO:Dossier'). Interpreted by the OpenConnector target.
targetSchema.title: Target Schema

fieldMappings.description: Ordered list of field-level mappings from Scholiq to target schema.

scholiqField.description: Property path in the Scholiq source object (dot-notation for nested, e.g. 'birthDate').
scholiqField.title: Scholiq Field

targetField.description: Property path in the external target schema.
targetField.title: Target Field

transform.description: Named transform to apply: 'bsn-to-pseudonym' (use eckId, never bsnEncrypted), 'date-iso8601', 'cohort-to-brin', or null for passthrough.
transform.title: Field Transform

fieldMappings.title: Field Mappings

validationProfile.description: Named external-schema validation profile to run before the job leaves the queue. Null = no pre-flight validation.
validationProfile.title: Validation Profile

active.description: Whether this profile is active. Inactive profiles are not available for new jobs.
active.title: Active

lifecycle.description: Profile lifecycle state.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Exchange learner and result data with external systems (DUO/BRON-ROD, OSO overstapdossier, municipality leerplicht, HR systems) over the agreed standards to meet statutory reporting and transfer obligations.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (DataExchangeJob carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; align with the school's selectielijst onderwijs)

DataExchangeJob.title: DataExchangeJob
DataExchangeJob.description: A request to push or pull data between Scholiq and an external system via an OpenConnector named connection. Scholiq implements no wire protocols — the job delegates entirely to OpenConnector. For OSO transfers, the job enters pending-parent-review before execution to allow parent approval of the dossier.

direction.description: Direction of data flow: export (Scholiq → external), import (external → Scholiq), or sync (bidirectional).
direction.title: Data Flow Direction

target.description: Named OpenConnector connection (e.g. 'bron-rod', 'oso', 'leerplicht', 'surfconext', 'hr', 'swv', 'ooapi-catalog'). 'swv' routes a zorgvraag/TLV-chain dossier (learning-plan's SupportRequest) to the regional samenwerkingsverband (openconnector#753). 'ooapi-catalog' syncs a published/archived Course, Programme, or Cohort to the OOAPI 5.0 course catalog hosted by opencatalogi, per the course-management publication contract (course → course, program → program, offering → offering; see openspec/changes/delegate-ooapi-to-opencatalogi/design.md). Scholiq implements no Edukoppeling/StUF/OSO-XML/Digikoppeling/SAML/OOAPI wire code — all protocol logic lives in OpenConnector.
target.title: OpenConnector Target

mappingProfileId.description: UUID of the DataMappingProfile to use for field transformation. Null = use raw Scholiq object.
mappingProfileId.title: Mapping Profile ID

scope.description: Describes which Scholiq objects are in scope for this job.

schema.description: Slug of the Scholiq schema to export/import (e.g. 'learner-profile', 'support-request' for the target: swv zorgvraag dossier).
schema.title: Schema

filters.description: Key-value filters to narrow the scope (passed to ObjectService::findAll).
filters.title: Scope Filters

cohortId.description: Limit scope to a specific cohort. Null = all cohorts.
cohortId.title: Cohort ID

period.description: ISO 8601 period or term identifier (e.g. '2025-2026/1'). Null = no period filter.
period.title: Period

scope.title: Job Scope

format.description: Output format hint (e.g. 'stuf-ebb', 'oso-xml'). Resolved by the OpenConnector target; Scholiq does not produce this format.
format.title: Output Format

requestedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of the user who requested this job.
requestedBy.title: Requested By

requestedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the job was requested.
requestedAt.title: Requested At

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the job started executing. Null until running.
startedAt.title: Started At

finishedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the job finished. Null until completed.
finishedAt.title: Finished At

result.description: Job execution result, populated when the job finishes.

recordsAccepted.description: Number of records successfully accepted by the target.
recordsAccepted.title: Records Accepted

recordsRejected.description: Number of records rejected (validation errors or target refusals).
recordsRejected.title: Records Rejected

validationReport.description: Per-record validation errors from the target. Assumed per-item shape (documented, not schema-enforced — items stays free-form object per record above): {recordId, errorCode, errorMessage, field?}. recordId MUST equal the _scholiqRecordId this job's buildPayload() stamped onto the corresponding outbound record, so RejectionMappingHandler can resolve a rejection back to its Scholiq source object.
validationReport.title: Validation Report

artefactRef.description: Reference to the produced XML/report stored as an OR file attachment (legally required retention). Null if no artefact was produced.
artefactRef.title: Artefact Reference

result.title: Job Result

connectorRunId.description: The OpenConnector run/execution ID returned by the connector after the job is dispatched. Used for status polling and audit.
connectorRunId.title: Connector Run ID

errorMessage.description: Human-readable error message when the job fails (e.g. 'OpenConnector connection bron-rod not found').
errorMessage.title: Error Message

originFlagId.description: UUID of an AttendanceFlag that auto-queued this job (e.g. a leerplicht threshold crossing). Null for manually-requested jobs.
originFlagId.title: Origin Flag ID

municipalityFeedback.description: The municipality's case-handling route (MAS-route) for a leerplicht report, recorded by an authorised coordinator/admin once the municipality communicates it via the recordMunicipalityFeedback transition. Scholiq neither polls for nor infers this — it only records what it is told, mirroring TlvApplication.decision's 'record, don't adjudicate' posture (openspec/changes/zorgvraag-swv-tlv-chain/design.md).

masRoute.description: The case-handling route (MAS-route) the municipality assigned this report to.
masRoute.title: MAS Route

receivedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the municipality's route decision was received. Stamped server-side by MunicipalityFeedbackGuard when not supplied.
receivedAt.title: Received At

note.description: Free-text note from the coordinator recording the municipality's feedback.
note.title: Note

recordedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of the coordinator/admin who recorded this feedback. Always stamped by MunicipalityFeedbackGuard from the transition actor — never trusts a caller-supplied value.
recordedBy.title: Recorded By

municipalityFeedback.title: Municipality Feedback

lifecycle.description: Job lifecycle state. OSO target: queued → pending-parent-review → running → succeeded|failed|partial. Other targets: queued → running → succeeded|failed|partial.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

pendingParentReview.description: OSO jobs enter this state so the dossier can be reviewed by a parent before sending.

approveDossier.description: Parent approves the OSO dossier; job proceeds to running.

run.description: Non-OSO jobs: direct queued → running. OSO jobs: blocked by DataExchangeRunGuard (must go via pending-parent-review → approveDossier).

recordMunicipalityFeedback.description: Coordinator/admin records the municipality's MAS-route feedback for a succeeded leerplicht report. A self-loop transition (lifecycle stays succeeded) used solely to attach MunicipalityFeedbackGuard's role + target check to this field write — this register has no declarative field-scoped write-authorization extension yet (ADR-031 exception; see design.md Security Considerations). ASSUMPTION (unverified against OpenRegister core, which is not present in this repo): the lifecycle engine permits a from==to transition; flag for confirmation during review.

durationSeconds.description: Duration of job execution in seconds (finishedAt - startedAt). Null until the job is finished.

ExchangeRejection.title: ExchangeRejection
ExchangeRejection.description: One row per record DUO (or any DataExchangeJob target) rejected via a job's result.validationReport entry — the afkeurmelding correction loop's ground truth. Created exclusively by RejectionMappingHandler, never through the generic object-create UI (mirrors GradeNotification). Resolves back to the Scholiq source object via sourceKind + one typed $ref id field per kind (mirrors GradeEntry.sourceKind), so an admin/principal can deep-link straight from the rejection to the object that needs fixing.

dataExchangeJobId.description: UUID of the DataExchangeJob whose result.validationReport produced this rejection.
dataExchangeJobId.title: Data Exchange Job ID

errorCode.description: The target's own error/afkeurcode, copied verbatim from validationReport[i].errorCode.
errorCode.title: Error Code

errorMessage.description: The target's own human-readable error message, copied verbatim from validationReport[i].errorMessage.
errorMessage.title: Error Message

errorCodeRef.description: Best-effort match against the ExchangeErrorCode catalogue by (code, target). Null when the code is not (yet) catalogued — this never blocks rejection creation.
errorCodeRef.title: Error Code Reference

offendingFields.description: Field path(s) the target identified as the cause, from validationReport[i].field when the connector supplies it. Empty when not derivable.
offendingFields.title: Offending Fields

sourceKind.description: Which Scholiq schema the rejected record belongs to, resolved from the originating DataExchangeJob's scope.schema. Determines which of the typed id fields below is set.
sourceKind.title: Source Kind

learnerProfileId.description: UUID of the rejected LearnerProfile (set when sourceKind=learner-profile).
learnerProfileId.title: Learner Profile ID

enrolmentId.description: UUID of the rejected Enrolment (set when sourceKind=enrolment).
enrolmentId.title: Enrolment ID

finalGradeId.description: UUID of the rejected FinalGrade (set when sourceKind=final-grade).
finalGradeId.title: Final Grade ID

attendanceFlagId.description: UUID of the rejected AttendanceFlag (set when sourceKind=attendance-flag).
attendanceFlagId.title: Attendance Flag ID

supportRequestId.description: UUID of the rejected SupportRequest (set when sourceKind=support-request).
supportRequestId.title: Support Request ID

rawRecord.description: The mapped payload record the target rejected, when the connector's response echoes it back. Kept for admin context without re-deriving it. Null when the connector's validationReport entry carries no record data (the documented {recordId, errorCode, errorMessage, field?} shape does not guarantee it).
rawRecord.title: Raw Record

status.description: Correction lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
status.title: Status

detectedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when RejectionMappingHandler created this row.
detectedAt.title: Detected At

correctedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of whoever performed the markCorrected transition.
correctedBy.title: Corrected By

correctedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the markCorrected transition was performed.
correctedAt.title: Corrected At

resubmittedJobId.description: UUID of the single-record DataExchangeJob RejectionResubmitGuard created for this rejection. Always server-stamped — never a caller-supplied value.
resubmittedJobId.title: Resubmitted Job ID

waivedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of whoever performed the waive transition. Always server-stamped by RejectionWaiveGuard.
waivedBy.title: Waived By

waivedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the waive transition was performed. Always server-stamped by RejectionWaiveGuard.
waivedAt.title: Waived At

waiveReason.description: Free-text reason for waiving this rejection. Required non-empty by RejectionWaiveGuard when status transitions to waived (mirrors DeliberationRecord.pupilVoice.waiverReason).
waiveReason.title: Waive Reason

correctionDeadlineAt.description: Externally-supplied correction deadline (admin-entered, or a future OpenConnector-carried aanlevering-cyclus deadline). NOT a computed fixed-offset value — no verifiable statutory day-count exists for BRON/ROD afkeurmelding correction, unlike AttendanceFlag.reportDeadlineAt's verified Leerplichtwet art. 21a anchor.
correctionDeadlineAt.title: Correction Deadline At

markCorrected.description: Admin/coordinator marks the underlying source object as fixed.

resubmit.description: Creates one new single-record DataExchangeJob scoped to this rejection's source object and stamps resubmittedJobId server-side.

accept.description: RejectionMappingHandler drives this when the resubmission job's validationReport no longer contains this recordId.

reopen.description: RejectionMappingHandler drives this when the resubmission job's validationReport still contains this recordId — errorCode/errorMessage are refreshed first.

waive.description: Admin/coordinator waives the rejection with a mandatory reason; waivedBy/waivedAt are server-stamped.

ageDays.description: Number of days since detectedAt. Always available regardless of whether a correctionDeadlineAt has been set — the honest, always-on urgency signal.

overdue.description: True once correctionDeadlineAt has been set and has passed, while status is not yet accepted/waived. False (not null) when no correctionDeadlineAt is set — mirrors AttendanceFlag.reportOverdue's null-safe if/eq-against-null shape already verified in DataExchangeJob.durationSeconds.

x-property-rbac._comment: Same tightest-available posture as SupportRequest/TlvApplication (design.md Security Considerations) — DUO afkeurmeldingen routinely quote learner PII (name, birth date, BSN-derived pseudonym) back in errorMessage/rawRecord. No dedicated data-exchange-coordinator role exists in this register.

ExchangeErrorCode.title: ExchangeErrorCode
ExchangeErrorCode.description: Local, admin-editable lookup catalogue of known target error/afkeurcodes, used by RejectionMappingHandler to best-effort resolve ExchangeRejection.errorCodeRef. Explicitly illustrative starter data, NOT an authoritative source — DUO owns the real BRON/ROD code list, and OpenConnector is the intended channel for keeping this catalogue current (an adapter issue, alongside the wire-protocol adapters the data-exchange spec's 'Delegate wire protocols to OpenConnector' requirement already lists, should carry catalogue updates).

code.description: The target's own error/afkeurcode identifier, e.g. as DUO issues it.
code.title: Code

target.description: Which DataExchangeJob.target this code applies to (e.g. 'bron-rod', 'oso', 'leerplicht'). Null = generic/unknown target.
target.title: Target

description.description: Bilingual human-readable explanation of the error code, same {nl, en} shape x-openregister-notifications.subject already uses throughout this register.

nl.description: Dutch explanation of the error code.
nl.title: Dutch Description

en.description: English explanation of the error code.
en.title: English Description

description.title: Description

severity.description: Whether the target's own semantics treat this as a hard rejection or an accepted-with-warning.
severity.title: Severity

active.description: Whether this catalogue entry is current. Deactivate stale codes without deleting history.
active.title: Active

description.nl: Ongeldig BSN-formaat (illustratief startgegeven — niet de autoritatieve DUO-lijst).
description.en: Invalid BSN format (illustrative starter data — not DUO's authoritative list).

description.nl: Ontbrekende geboortedatum (illustratief startgegeven — niet de autoritatieve DUO-lijst).
description.en: Missing birth date (illustrative starter data — not DUO's authoritative list).

description.nl: Overlappende inschrijving gedetecteerd (illustratief startgegeven — niet de autoritatieve DUO-lijst).
description.en: Overlapping enrolment detected (illustrative starter data — not DUO's authoritative list).

description.nl: Ontbrekende vooropleidingscode (illustratief startgegeven — niet de autoritatieve DUO-lijst).
description.en: Missing prior-education code (illustrative starter data — not DUO's authoritative list).

description.nl: Onvolledig overstapdossier (illustratief startgegeven — niet de autoritatieve DUO-lijst).
description.en: Incomplete transfer dossier (illustrative starter data — not DUO's authoritative list).

description.nl: Ontbrekend BRIN-nummer (illustratief startgegeven — niet de autoritatieve DUO-lijst).
description.en: Missing BRIN number (illustrative starter data — not DUO's authoritative list).

GradeNotification.title: GradeNotification
GradeNotification.description: Lightweight parent-notification record created by GradeRollupHandler when a GradeEntry publishes. Contains no grade values — only the fields needed to dispatch the notification to a parent. Records are append-only. The canonical GradeEntry is never modified during fan-out (fixes #183, wave-12 WF4).

recipient.description: Nextcloud user ID of the notification recipient (parent).
recipient.title: Recipient

sourceId.description: UUID or id of the source GradeEntry that triggered this notification.
sourceId.title: Source ID

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner whose grade was published.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

learnerRef.description: UUID reference to the LearnerProfile object whose grade was published — the portal inbox scoping key (ADR-046 A4). Distinct from learnerId, which is the Nextcloud user id, and from recipient, which is the Nextcloud user id of the notified parent. Additive and optional; existing rows leave it unset and stay invisible to the portal inbox (fail-closed) until backfilled.
learnerRef.title: Learner Ref

courseId.description: UUID of the associated Course. Null when not applicable.
courseId.title: Course ID

visibleFrom.description: Earliest datetime at which this parent notification is eligible to fire. Stamped by GradeRollupHandler from the resolved GradeEntry.visibleFrom at the moment this record is created, so parent notifications fire on the same schedule as the learner's.
visibleFrom.title: Visible From

Praktijkopleider.title: Praktijkopleider
Praktijkopleider.description: The workplace supervisor (praktijkopleider) conducting BPV at a leerbedrijf. A plain reference/identity object with no OpenRegister lifecycle — a person with no Nextcloud account by definition (ADR-046 premise). This object's own UUID is the portal identity anchor. `active` alone gates whether the portal identity is usable.

email.description: Contact email address of the praktijkopleider — used for out-of-band (non-Scholiq) communication, since no NC-reachable notification channel exists for this role.
email.title: Email Address

phone.description: Contact phone number of the praktijkopleider.
phone.title: Phone Number

leerbedrijfName.description: Trade name of the leerbedrijf (workplace/employer) this praktijkopleider represents.
leerbedrijfName.title: Leerbedrijf Name

leerbedrijfKvkNumber.description: KVK (Chamber of Commerce) number of the leerbedrijf this praktijkopleider represents. Default reference value; the operative SBB-verification KVK number is recorded on BpvPlacement.leerbedrijfKvkNumber.
leerbedrijfKvkNumber.title: Leerbedrijf KVK Number

active.description: Whether this praktijkopleider's portal identity is currently usable. False retires the identity without deleting the audit trail.
active.title: Active

BpvPlacement.title: BPV Placement
BpvPlacement.description: A learner ↔ leerbedrijf match for one beroepspraktijkvorming (BPV, work-placement) period. Gates confirmation on a verified leerbedrijf (WEB art. 7.2.8/7.2.9 — the employer must be a leerbedrijf erkend by SBB) via BpvConfirmationGuard.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner on this placement.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

learnerRef.description: UUID of the learner's LearnerProfile object — the portal-subject scoping key (ADR-046 A4). Modelled A4-clean from day one alongside learnerId, unlike schemas that needed a retrofit.
learnerRef.title: Learner Ref

programmeId.description: UUID of the Programme this placement belongs to.
programmeId.title: Programme ID

curriculumPlanId.description: UUID of the governing CurriculumPlan (the opleidingsplan-mbo profile) this placement's werkproces assessments are graded against.
curriculumPlanId.title: Curriculum Plan ID

praktijkopleiderId.description: UUID of the Praktijkopleider (workplace supervisor) responsible for this placement.
praktijkopleiderId.title: Praktijkopleider ID

schoolCoachId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the internal BPV-coordinator / docent-begeleider for this placement.
schoolCoachId.title: School Coach ID

leerbedrijfName.description: Trade name of the leerbedrijf hosting this placement.
leerbedrijfName.title: Leerbedrijf Name

leerbedrijfKvkNumber.description: KVK number of the leerbedrijf hosting this placement — the identifier checked against the SBB erkend-leerbedrijf register via leerbedrijfVerification.
leerbedrijfKvkNumber.title: Leerbedrijf KVK Number

periodFrom.description: Start date of the BPV placement period.
periodFrom.title: Period From

periodTo.description: End date of the BPV placement period.
periodTo.title: Period To

leerbedrijfVerification.description: SBB erkend-leerbedrijf verification result, resolved via the pluggable ProvidesLeerbedrijfVerification provider. Written back by BpvLeerbedrijfVerificationHandler on the checkLeerbedrijf transition. An unconfigured provider leaves this object at its default (status: unverified) and the placement simply cannot confirm.
leerbedrijfVerification.title: Leerbedrijf Verification

provider.description: Configured ProvidesLeerbedrijfVerification adapter identifier resolved via DI. Null means no adapter is configured — Scholiq ships none.
provider.title: Verification Provider

status.description: Result of the SBB erkend-leerbedrijf check. Only 'verified' satisfies BpvConfirmationGuard.
status.title: Verification Status

erkenningNumber.description: SBB erkenning number returned by the provider, when verified.
erkenningNumber.title: Erkenning Number

verifiedAt.description: Timestamp of the last verification result written back by the handler.
verifiedAt.title: Verified At

expiresAt.description: Expiry date of the SBB erkenning, when returned by the provider. Re-verification / expiry monitoring past the initial confirmation gate is out of scope for this change.
expiresAt.title: Expires At

raw.description: Raw provider response payload, for audit purposes. Excluded from the praktijkopleider portal field projection.
raw.title: Raw Provider Payload

lifecycle.description: Placement lifecycle state.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

Praktijkovereenkomst.title: Praktijkovereenkomst (POK)
Praktijkovereenkomst.description: The three-party work-placement agreement (WEB art. 7.2.8/7.2.9) for one BpvPlacement — student, school, and praktijkopleider all sign. Activation is gated on all three PokSignatures existing, enforced by PokActivationGuard.

bpvPlacementId.description: UUID of the BpvPlacement this POK governs.
bpvPlacementId.title: BPV Placement ID

periodFrom.description: Start date covered by this POK.
periodFrom.title: Period From

periodTo.description: End date covered by this POK.
periodTo.title: Period To

terms.description: Structured clauses or rich text of the agreement's terms, per the MBO Raad servicedocument POK.
terms.title: Terms

version.description: Version number of this POK. PokSignature rows are keyed to a specific (subjectId, subjectVersion) pair.
version.title: Version

lifecycle.description: POK lifecycle state.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

isFullySigned.description: True once a PokSignature exists for each of the three required roles (student, school, praktijkopleider) on this POK's current (subjectId, subjectVersion). A duplicate signature for the same role still counts as one distinct role toward the three. Gates PokActivationGuard's `activate` transition. NOTE: expressed with x-openregister-aggregate-refs (one count per required role); PokActivationGuard independently re-derives this same fact by querying PokSignature directly via ObjectService, which is the tested, authoritative enforcement — this field is the declarative read-surface for the frontend.

PokSignature.title: POK Signature
PokSignature.description: Co-sign record on a specific Praktijkovereenkomst version. Append-only — signatures are immutable audit evidence. Field-for-field shape parity with the learning-plan Signature schema; a parallel schema (not a widened Signature) because Signature.subjectId is hard-$ref'd to LearningPlan and the fleet's relation-dialect gate bans polymorphic $ref targets.

subjectId.description: UUID of the Praktijkovereenkomst being signed.
subjectId.title: Subject ID

subjectVersion.description: Version of the Praktijkovereenkomst being signed.
subjectVersion.title: Subject Version

signerId.description: NC user ID (student/school) or Praktijkopleider object UUID (workplace role) of the person signing — an opaque string in this field.
signerId.title: Signer ID

signerRole.description: Role of the signer in relation to the POK.
signerRole.title: Signer Role

signedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the signing action.
signedAt.title: Signed At

assuranceLevel.description: eIDAS assurance level of the signing method used.
assuranceLevel.title: eIDAS Assurance Level

evidenceRef.description: Optional reference to signing evidence (e.g. redirect log, scan URL).
evidenceRef.title: Evidence Reference

WerkprocesAssessment.title: Werkproces Assessment
WerkprocesAssessment.description: One workplace assessment against one werkproces of the kwalificatiedossier, for one BpvPlacement. A confirmed assessment emits or updates a GradeEntry for its curriculumPlanId/componentId via WerkprocesGradeEmitHandler — this schema computes no final grade itself. competencyId (nullable, server-resolved) generalizes kwalificatiedossierCode/kerntaakCode/werkprocesCode into the competency capability's shared taxonomy; a confirmed assessment with a resolved competencyId also updates the learner's CompetencyAttainment via CompetencyAttainmentRollupHandler.

bpvPlacementId.description: UUID of the BpvPlacement this assessment belongs to.
bpvPlacementId.title: BPV Placement ID

componentId.description: Identifier of the CurriculumPlan.components[] entry (kind: 'assessment') this werkproces assessment feeds into — the existing generic grading hook, no new component kind needed.
componentId.title: Component ID

kerntaakCode.description: SBB kerntaak code within the kwalificatiedossier.
kerntaakCode.title: Kerntaak Code

werkprocesCode.description: SBB werkproces code within the kerntaak.
werkprocesCode.title: Werkproces Code

werkprocesLabel.description: Human-readable label of the werkproces being assessed.
werkprocesLabel.title: Werkproces Label

competencyId.description: UUID of the Competency (competency capability) this assessment's werkprocesCode resolves to, matched server-side at creation time against a Competency.code under a CompetencyFramework with sourceAuthority: sbb-kwalificatiedossier. Never accepted as client input — including from the praktijkopleider portal action, whose field whitelist deliberately excludes this field. Remains null when no matching Competency is found; kwalificatiedossierCode/kerntaakCode/werkprocesCode/werkprocesLabel remain the sole record of what was assessed and confirmation is never blocked by an unresolved competencyId.
competencyId.title: Competency ID

assessorId.description: UUID of the Praktijkopleider who performed this assessment.
assessorId.title: Assessor ID

beoordeling.description: Workplace assessment outcome for this werkproces.
beoordeling.title: Beoordeling

lifecycle.description: Assessment lifecycle state.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

BpvVisitReport.title: BPV Visit Report
BpvVisitReport.description: A visit or three-way-conversation report for one BpvPlacement, linked to the learner's LearnerProfile dossier via learnerRef. Declares a visitDueReminder notification off nextVisitDue, targeting the internal schoolCoachId (the praktijkopleider has no NC-reachable channel).

bpvPlacementId.description: UUID of the BpvPlacement this visit report belongs to.
bpvPlacementId.title: BPV Placement ID

learnerRef.description: UUID of the learner's LearnerProfile object — the dossier link.
learnerRef.title: Learner Ref

visitDate.description: Date the visit or three-way conversation took place.
visitDate.title: Visit Date

visitKind.description: Kind of visit or conversation recorded.
visitKind.title: Visit Kind

attendees.description: Attendees of the visit — praktijkopleider/other external attendees have no reliable NC uid, so each entry carries a free-text role + name instead of a user reference.
attendees.title: Attendees

schoolCoachId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the internal BPV-coordinator / docent-begeleider who logged this visit — the visitDueReminder recipient.
schoolCoachId.title: School Coach ID

narrative.description: Free-text narrative of the visit or conversation.
narrative.title: Narrative

actionPoints.description: Action points agreed during the visit.
actionPoints.title: Action Points

lifecycle.description: Visit report lifecycle state.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

nextVisitDue.description: visitDate plus a fixed 60-day cadence — the next visit / three-way-conversation due date. Same derived-field idiom as ActionItem.isOverdue (no TimedJob).

ConferenceRound.title: Conference Round
ConferenceRound.description: One oudergesprekken-cyclus (parent-teacher conference round) for a report period: scope (cohorts, teachers), slot duration/buffer, and a booking window. Drives invitations, guardian/self signup, and the ConferenceScheduleGenerator's greedy conflict-free slot generation.

name.description: Human-readable round name, e.g. 'Oudergesprekken Q2 2026 — Onderbouw'.
name.title: Round Name

cohortIds.description: UUIDs of the Cohorts in scope for this conference round.
cohortIds.title: Cohort IDs

teacherIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of teachers eligible to hold conversations in this round.
teacherIds.title: Teacher IDs

slotDurationMinutes.description: Length of a single conversation slot in minutes.
slotDurationMinutes.title: Slot Duration (Minutes)

bufferMinutes.description: Walking-time gap in minutes required between the end of one slot and the start of the next for the same teacher. Configurable per round (story 10056 AC).
bufferMinutes.title: Buffer Minutes

bookingOpensAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp from which guardians/self may submit ConferenceSignups.
bookingOpensAt.title: Booking Opens At

bookingClosesAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp after which no further ConferenceSignups are accepted.
bookingClosesAt.title: Booking Closes At

invitedLearnerIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of every learner invited to this round, computed once from cohortIds → each Cohort.learnerIds and persisted at the send-invitations transition (denormalised so the verified notification dialect's kind:field recipient can resolve it — see design.md).
invitedLearnerIds.title: Invited Learner IDs

lifecycle.description: Conference round lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

isBookingClosed.description: True once bookingClosesAt has passed. Same derived-field idiom as Session.isPast — informational only; NOTE this does NOT itself drive the booking-open → booking-closed lifecycle transition (the verified x-openregister-notifications dialect's `scheduled` trigger can only fire a notification, not a lifecycle transition — see the bookingAutoClosed notification below and the apply report's flagged conflict). A coordinator (or a future dedicated mechanism) must still invoke the close-booking transition explicitly.

subject.nl: Je bent uitgenodigd voor de oudergesprekken
subject.en: You are invited to the parent-teacher conferences

subject.nl: Het boekingsvenster voor oudergesprekken is verstreken — sluit het venster handmatig af
subject.en: The conference booking window has passed — close the booking window manually

TeacherAvailability.title: Teacher Availability
TeacherAvailability.description: A teacher's declared free blocks for one ConferenceRound. Consumed by ConferenceScheduleGenerator when the round transitions to generate/regenerate; locked afterwards to prevent a race between a late edit and a running solve.

conferenceRoundId.description: UUID of the ConferenceRound this availability applies to.
conferenceRoundId.title: Conference Round ID

teacherId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the declaring teacher.
teacherId.title: Teacher ID

blocks.description: The teacher's free time blocks for this round, sliced by ConferenceScheduleGenerator into slotDurationMinutes candidate slots.

startsAt.description: ISO 8601 start of the free block.
startsAt.title: Block Start

endsAt.description: ISO 8601 end of the free block.
endsAt.title: Block End

blocks.title: Availability Blocks

lifecycle.description: Availability lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

ConferenceSignup.title: Conference Signup
ConferenceSignup.description: A guardian's (or self, for an 18+ learner) request for conversation slots with one or more teachers in a ConferenceRound, in stated preference order. The submit transition is gated by ConferenceSignupGuardianGuard; a draft signup is never read by ConferenceScheduleGenerator.

conferenceRoundId.description: UUID of the ConferenceRound this signup belongs to.
conferenceRoundId.title: Conference Round ID

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner this signup is for.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

learnerRef.description: UUID reference to the LearnerProfile this signup is for — the portal-subject scoping key (ADR-046 A4). Distinct from learnerId, which is the Nextcloud user id. Additive and optional; existing rows leave it unset (fail-closed) until backfilled, matching the ExcuseRequest.learnerRef / GradeEntry.learnerRef convention.
learnerRef.title: Learner Ref

guardianId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the submitting guardian. Null for an 18+ self-signup (the learner submits for themselves).
guardianId.title: Guardian ID

guardianRef.description: UUID reference to the domain object that submitted this signup (the guardian's own LearnerProfile-linked identity for a parent submission, or the learner's own LearnerProfile for an 18+ self-signup) — the portal scope-stamp for parent-audience creates (ADR-046 A4), matching the ExcuseRequest.submittedByRef convention. Additive and optional; existing rows leave it unset.
guardianRef.title: Guardian Ref

requestedTeacherIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of the requested teachers, in the guardian's/learner's stated preference order. ConferenceScheduleGenerator walks this array in order for each signup.
requestedTeacherIds.title: Requested Teacher IDs

notes.description: Optional free-text note from the guardian/learner. Also used by ConferenceScheduleGenerator to record which requested teacher could not be met when a signup lands waitlisted.
notes.title: Notes

lifecycle.description: Signup lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

ConferenceSlot.title: Conference Slot
ConferenceSlot.description: One generated conversation appointment, written by ConferenceScheduleGenerator. Guaranteed conflict-free per teacher and per signup (no two ConferenceSlots for the same teacher or the same signup overlap).

conferenceRoundId.description: UUID of the ConferenceRound this slot belongs to.
conferenceRoundId.title: Conference Round ID

teacherId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the teacher holding this conversation.
teacherId.title: Teacher ID

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner this conversation is about.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

learnerRef.description: UUID reference to the learner's LearnerProfile — additive, matching the ExcuseRequest.learnerRef convention. Unset until backfilled.
learnerRef.title: Learner Ref

signupId.description: UUID of the ConferenceSignup this slot was generated for. Null for a coordinator hand-created slot.
signupId.title: Signup ID

startsAt.description: ISO 8601 start timestamp of the conversation.
startsAt.title: Start Time

endsAt.description: ISO 8601 end timestamp of the conversation.
endsAt.title: End Time

location.description: Room code or online URL, mirrors Session.location.
location.title: Location

lifecycle.description: Slot lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

ConferenceReport.title: Conference Report
ConferenceReport.description: A gespreksverslag (conversation report) recorded against a completed ConferenceSlot. Append-only — immutable audit evidence once recorded, mirroring LearningPlanEvaluation's shape so it joins the learner's queryable record set.

conferenceSlotId.description: UUID of the completed ConferenceSlot this report was written for.
conferenceSlotId.title: Conference Slot ID

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner this report is about.
learnerId.title: Learner ID
